name: Corky Messner
subject: We cannot rest - Help my campaign ramp up FAST!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Rush an urgent contribution now!
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d7ae8af4b134cc14/f80dd55a24628690c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Have you heard the news? Tonight, **we emerged VICTORIOUS in the Republican Primary for U.S. Senate!**
Unfortunately, there isn’t time to rest on our laurels. As we speak, the Democrats are propping up D.C. Jeanne Shaheen with outside money to defend her seat.
They know that the path to a Senate majority runs through New Hampshire, and I’m going to give them the fight of their lifetime.
But Peter, I need YOUR help to make waves. There are less than two months until the General Election, and the Democrats already have a leg up on us with their online fundraising.
_**[Will you rush an emergency contribution right now so that we can immediately respond to their attacks and hit the ground running?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d7ae8af4b134cc14/47b625b96c25af90c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**_ Your contribution has never been more important as we sprint to the finish line in November. [Rush an emergency $5 donation](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d7ae8af4b134cc14/69a2130335989374c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Rush an emergency $10 donation](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d7ae8af4b134cc14/ab8cde05b8a54da6c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Rush an emergency $25 donation](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d7ae8af4b134cc14/de5466b0107f83a6c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Rush an emergency $50 donation](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d7ae8af4b134cc14/60a03bd09aff599cc3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Rush an emergency $100 donation](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d7ae8af4b134cc14/8ca1ba697697d3a7c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Rush an emergency donation of any amount](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d7ae8af4b134cc14/8b9846f311e74130c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, I’m a proven leader in the business world, not some career politician who’s been mucking it up in The Swamp. **I learned my leadership skills while attending West Point, and later serving my country overseas... not by pushing bureaucratic policy and putting up red tape**.
I will stand with President Trump as an ALLY, not a partisan road block, to support his America First Agenda. _In fact, my USA Plan is specifically geared towards using the President’s policies to benefit New Hampshire small businesses and revive our economy_.
**The stakes have never been higher, and we have a fight on our hands for the future of New Hampshire**.

[_**Will you rush a contribution right now and help me ensure that we have Conservative leadership, not D.C. Jeanne Shaheen’s liberal politics?**_](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d7ae8af4b134cc14/579b891de83a51fbc3d6b838967d376c/33153)

**BREAKING: Koch network launches ad campaign in Georgia**
Friend, did you catch this??

The Koch network -- the long-standing, highly influential right-wing special interest group -- is **planning to spend _MILLIONS OF DOLLARS_ on campaign ads for Republicans in key Senate races -- _including Jon Ossoff's race here in Georgia!!_**

The Kochs are so focused on the Senate because they know if Republicans lose the majority and Mitch McConnell's power trip ends, they won't have nearly as much influence in our government.

**[Friend, help us stave off this onslaught of money against Jon in Georgia>>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2abd/5b2c1286/38fa324c/25f0a5fa/2423429259/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_08_koch?refcode=em_2020_09_08_koch")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Troy=20Nehls?=
subject: 8 Weeks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nehls for Congress
body:
We need volunteers to staff our headquarters, make phone calls, and knock doors. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/728b08c99cc4/i-need-your-help-883062?e=e4728463fc)
---
| |
---
| | Friends,

The traditional campaign theory is that **elections really begin on Labor Day.**

The last eight weeks we have set the stage for all the work to come. Our volunteers and interns have laid the groundwork by making phone calls, texting, and block walking. Our coalitions representing various communities have created strategies and reached out to community leaders. Our staff has stayed focused on organizing, fundraising, and leading the troops.

**We are ready!**

All indications are that this could be a close race. Several national pundits call it a “toss-up.” However, data shows us with a clear lead, but we will not take that for granted. We cannot take that for granted!

**[_We still need your help to win on November 3 rd_!](https://nehlsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f1efeb71566d5b848c6535fb5&id=be37efac3d&e=e4728463fc)**

If you have not already, will you please sign up to help? We aren’t asking for a specific commitment, just that you add your name to our volunteer list so that we can reach out when we have projects.

**All you have to do is follow this link and give us your contact information. It is that simple!**

---
| [Volunteer Now >>](https://nehlsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f1efeb71566d5b848c6535fb5&id=ab936a74aa&e=e4728463fc "Volunteer Now >>")
---
| The next eight weeks will decide who represents you in Congress.

I am committed to being the voice for all our district's residents. I am committed to representing YOU regardless of your background, ethnicity, party, or religion. I am committed to shaking up Washington and bringing commonsense solutions to the table.

[**_Can you commit to help me get there?_**](https://nehlsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f1efeb71566d5b848c6535fb5&id=c0f8d924e4&e=e4728463fc)

Eight weeks can make all the difference. [**Please sign up today!**](https://nehlsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f1efeb71566d5b848c6535fb5&id=f6acb7fa2a&e=e4728463fc)

Thank you,

Sheriff Troy Nehls

All you have to do is follow this link and give us your contact information. It is that simple! | "Volunteer Now >>" | The next eight weeks will decide who represents you in Congress. I am committed to being the voice for all our district's residents. I am committed to representing YOU regardless of your background, ethnicity, party, or religion. I am committed to shaking up Washington and bringing commonsense solutions to the table. Eight weeks can make all the difference. Thank you, Sheriff Troy Nehls | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Nehls for Congress | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Nehls for Congress 1612 Crabb River Rd Richmond, Texas 77469 * USA

name: Anna Wintour
subject: I'm holding a grassroots event with Jill Biden tomorrow. Will you join me?
body:
We'll also have a few special guests, some of my personal friends and fantastic American designers, joining us. |
---

| [](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b276/1cd0ac28/15e6a85dc/35706d9d/2643710731/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/rsvp-to-anna-wintour-discussion?source=JB_EM_VF_2020.09.04_B3_wintourgrfr_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_rs&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.09.04_B3_wintourgrfr_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_rs")
---
Peter --

I was proud to endorse Joe Biden as a man of character, who demonstrates decency, honor, compassion, trustworthiness, and best of all _experience_. And I was thrilled when he chose Kamala Harris as his running mate.

I've also watched President Trump's response to the pandemic in horror -- he's encouraged people to drink disinfectant, refused to take any responsibility, and let more than 180,000 Americans die.

These months have been a reminder -- as if we needed a reminder -- that America must choose a new president. That's why I'm doing my part to make sure we defeat Donald Trump and elect Joe and Kamala, and Democrats down the ballot in November.

**And it's why I'll be holding a special grassroots discussion with Dr. Jill Biden tomorrow, September 9, at 6 p.m. eastern.**

We'll also have a few special guests, some of my personal friends and fantastic American designers, joining us. It will be an event filled with great conversation, so you won't want to miss it.

[Peter, you don't even have to donate to attend this event, but I do hope you will consider contributing. Just click this link to RSVP, and Joe's team will send you the details about how to join me, Dr. Biden, and our special guests tomorrow.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b276/1cd0ac28/15e6a85dc/35706d9d/2643710731/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/rsvp-to-anna-wintour-discussion?source=JB_EM_VF_2020.09.04_B3_wintourgrfr_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_rs&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.09.04_B3_wintourgrfr_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_rs")
[RSVP to the grassroots fundraiser ≫](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b276/1cd0ac28/15e6a85dc/35706d9d/2643710731/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/rsvp-to-anna-wintour-discussion?source=JB_EM_VF_2020.09.04_B3_wintourgrfr_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_rs&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.09.04_B3_wintourgrfr_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_rs")
---
We all have to do our part in this final stretch of the campaign, Peter. In just two months, we'll find out whether America has chosen a new president who can get us through this pandemic and begin to build us back better than we were before.

I'm doing everything I can right now to make sure I don't wake up on November 4th with any regrets, and I hope you are too, Peter.

If you're ready to elect a president and Democrats across the country who can govern, who understand how to get results out of Congress, who can set this country on a path to sustainability -- and who put the well-being of others before their own -- it's time to get to work.

[Will you reserve your ticket for my special grassroots event and conversation with Dr. Biden tomorrow, September 9, at 6 p.m.? Please join us by submitting your email and the Biden Victory Fund will follow up with your link to join the event:](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b276/1cd0ac28/15e6a85dc/35706d9d/2643710731/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/rsvp-to-anna-wintour-discussion?source=JB_EM_VF_2020.09.04_B3_wintourgrfr_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_rs&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.09.04_B3_wintourgrfr_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_rs")

[https://go.joebiden.com/Anna-Wintour-Discussion](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b276/1cd0ac28/15e6a85dc/35706d9d/2643710731/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/rsvp-to-anna-wintour-discussion?source=JB_EM_VF_2020.09.04_B3_wintourgrfr_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_rs&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.09.04_B3_wintourgrfr_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_rs")

See you soon,

Anna Wintour

_Anna Wintour has held the position as editor-in-chief of US Vogue since July 1988. She was named US Artistic Director of Cond e Nast in March 2013 and most recently, she was appointed global content advisor of Conde Nast in August of 2019._
[DONATE](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.09.04_B3_wintourgrfr_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_rs&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.09.04_B3_wintourgrfr_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_rs")
---
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b276/1cd0ac28/15e6a85dc/35706d9b/2643710731/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b276/1cd0ac28/15e6a85dc/35706d9a/2643710731/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b276/1cd0ac28/15e6a85dc/35706d99/2643710731/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b276/1cd0ac28/15e6a85dc/35706d98/2643710731/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b276/1cd0ac28/15e6a85dc/35706d97/2643710731/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-info-bvf"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b276/1cd0ac28/15e6a85dc/35706d96/2643710731/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and the Democrats.

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden and Democrats up and down the ballot by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b276/1cd0ac28/15e6a85dc/35706d95/2643710731/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf-homepage&refcode=VF_EM_FR_2020.06.16_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer?amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b276/1cd0ac28/15e6a85dc/35706d96/2643710731/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- Biden Victory Fund
Paid for by Biden Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Biden for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, ID, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY.
_Contributions or gifts to Biden Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Biden Victory Fund accepts contributions of up to $721,300 from a person and $345,000 from a multicandidate committee ("PAC"). The first $2,800/$5,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to Biden for President. The next $35,500/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $150,000/$75,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AZ, CO, FL, GA, MI, MN, NC, NE, NH, NV, OH, PA, TX, VA, and WI. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AL, DE, KS, LA, MA, MD, MS, NJ, NY, VT, and WV. The next $210,000/$105,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AK, AR, CT, DC, HI, ID, IN, KY, ME, MO, MT, ND, NM, OK, OR, RI, SC, TN, UT, WA, and WY. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant.

The allocation listed above may change if a contributor designates their contribution for a particular participant(s) or if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle._

name: Team Hagerty
subject: Looking Ahead To November, #TeamHagerty Continues To Build Momentum
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-e-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-jd/) September 8, 2020 **One Month Since Our Primary Victory** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-r/) This weekend, we celebrated one month since Bill Hagerty was announced as the Republican Nominee for U.S. Senate in Tennessee. There are now 56 days until Election Day on November 3, and Team Hagerty isn't slowing down. We're so grateful for the love and support Tennesseans have shown us throughout this journey so far. #TeamHagerty is going to keep pushing and continue our momentum until we can call him Senator Hagerty!You can watch the full video [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-y/) **ICYMI: We Must Support Farmers, Walking Horse Industry** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-j/) Last week, Bill released his latest editorial in the _Shelbyville Times-Gazette_ on the importance of protecting our farmers and the walking horse industry in our state. Our agriculture industry is an essential part of our economy, bringing in nearly $75 billion of revenue per year. The walking horse industry plays a vital role in Tennessee's economy and agriculture. Having the center of the industry in Shelbyville means that it provides a huge boost to our state's economy. As our next Senator, Bill will continue working closely with Tennesseans to support and protect our walking horse industry, support our agriculture industry and stimulate our state economy.Read the full editorial [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-t/) **Looking To November** We are so proud of all of the work Team Hagerty has done to get us this far, but the race isn't over yet! We have another election to win in November. This time, it's not just sending Bill to the United States Senate, we must reelect President Donald Trump for four more years and expand our Republican supermajority in Tennessee so we can continue to stand up to the radical liberals who want to push America toward a socialist state. **Are You Registered To Vote?** Early voting begins in only 43 days! Make sure you're registered to vote and are ready to support President Trump and Team Hagerty in the election this November. You can register and find out more information on your polling location [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-i/)
## **Be A Part Of #TeamHagerty**
[TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-d/) [DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-h/) [VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-k/)
## **Press Highlights**
**[Jackson Sun:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-u/) U.S. Senate candidate Bill Hagerty hears concerns from leaders in West Tennessee****[WBBJ:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-o/) Sheriffs, mayors attend Q&A with Senate candidate Bill Hagerty****[Townhall:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-m/) Bill Hagerty: To Bring Our Supply Chains Home, We Must Continue to Make America the Most Attractive Place to Invest Capital****[WVLT:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-c/) Catching Up With the Candidates: Bill Hagerty**
## **What They're Saying...**
> _"__Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"_
> [-President Donald Trump](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-q/) _" TN's Bill Hagerty is my friend & has been a champion for President Donald Trump's AMERICA FIRST agenda from Day One. Bill will fight for Conservative values, stand up for Life, Protect 2A Rights & create American jobs. TN & America need Bill Hagerty in the Senate!" _
> [-Vice President Mike Pence](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-a/) _" I fully support Bill Hagerty for the #TNSen, because I need a true Tennessee conservative to stand with me to protect our shared values. Bill is a true conservative, & he will always fight for you. Send him to the Senate to work with me & President Donald Trump." _
> [-Senator Marsha Blackburn](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-f/) _" Tennessee - send Bill Hagerty to the Senate. He supported President Donald Trump in 2016 & has worked closely with him since. Bill is the ONLY Trump conservative in the #TNSen race. He has my total support." _
> [-Fox News' Sean Hannity](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-z/) _" Bill was really a member of Team Trump before it was politically advantageous - before anybody else said let's jump on board, and he's been ready to work with President Trump since day one and he wants to do the same for Tennessee families."_
> [-Lara Trump](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-v/) _" Bill was on the Trump train before it was politically expedient. My father trusts him, he believes in him. For my father to have endorsed Bill Hagerty early in a primary, tells you all you need to know about the man."_
> [-Donald Trump Jr.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-e/)_" Ideologically, Bill is an unapologetic and a very proud conservative, and what I mean by that is he's for free markets, he is for freedom, not free stuff, and he respects the dignity and the liberty of each individual, and I know that's what makes him a conservative."_
> [-Kellyanne Conway](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-s/) _" Bill has been a good friend, he was a great ambassador to the US in Tokyo and he is going to be a fantastic senator. If there is one word I would use to describe Bill it's fearless. Bill helped solidify and strengthen our relationship with Japan which is absolutely essential to us standing up to China. Believe me, I can tell you that Beijing noticed the minute Bill got on the ground."_
> [-Sen. Tom Cotton](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-g/) _" Bill Hagerty is TERRIFIC! Can't wait to call him Senator Hagerty come November!"_
> [-KT McFarland](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-w/) _" We are excited to endorse Bill Hagerty for Senate and are fully confident he will be an unwavering pro-life advocate. Bill has served his country and President Trump with distinction, and we're thrilled to see him bring his leadership to the United States Senate where he will continue to make Tennesseans proud."_
> [-Marilyn Musgrave](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-yd/) _" We need leaders like that on the floor of the U.S. Senate because frankly, the next couple of years are going to be about the Great American Come Back. The Great American Revival. That's why we need Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Larry Kudlow](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-yh/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Nikki Haley](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-yk/) _" Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County."_
> [-Eddie Farris, Sheriff](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-yu/) _" You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_
> [-Mayor Robby Hatcher](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-jl/)
| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-jr/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-jy/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-jj/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-jt/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-ji/)
---|---|---|---|---
Team Hagerty
P.O. Box 150748
Nashville, TN 37215
[ Share ](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-fb-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-jh/)
[ Tweet ](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-tw-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-jk/)
[ Forward ](https://hfs.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-fuutjhhtj-76178D70-xlrhtdl-l-tl)
[Preferences](https://hfs.updatemyprofile.com/t-xlrhtdl-76178D70-fuutjhhtj-tr) | [Unsubscribe](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-u-xlrhtdl-fuutjhhtj-ty/)

That's why we need Bill Hagerty." " I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty." " Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County." " You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_ | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Team Hagerty P.O. Box 150748 Nashville, TN 37215 |

I’ve always enjoyed the INCREDIBLE support from our grassroots conservative supporters, and I know that none of our accomplishments would be possible without YOU. To thank you for your outstanding support over the last few years, I want to offer you a special, once-in-a-lifetime opportunity. I want to meet you in Washington, D.C. on September 25th, and you can bring a guest of your choice. We’ll cover your flight, you’ll get to stay at my FAVORITE hotel, and we’ll even take a photo together. All you have to do is contribute ANY AMOUNT before 11:59 PM TONIGHT and you will be automatically entered to win a trip to meet me in Washington, D.C. >> CONTRIBUTE $20 CONTRIBUTE $15 CONTRIBUTE $10 CONTRIBUTE $5 CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT I really want to meet you. The deadline to enter is soon so don’t wait. Be one of the FIRST Patriots to enter. Contribute ANY AMOUNT TODAY to win a trip to meet yours truly in Washington, D.C. Thank you, Donald J. Trump President of the United States CONTRIBUTE $5 Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, CONTRIBUTION, OR TEXT MESSAGE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing or sending a text message will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Trump Make America Great Again by clicking here. Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking here or texting “WASHINGTONDC” to 88022 & 80810 for one (1) entry. By sending a text message from your mobile phone , you are providing your written consent to receive calls and SMS/MMS messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from each of the participating committees in the Trump Make America Great Again Committee, Donald J. Trump for President Inc. and the Republican National Committee. Text message and data rates may apply. Consent is not required as a condition of entry. Text STOP to 88022 and 80810 to opt-out. Entries must be received between September 5, 2020, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and ends on September 20, 2020 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) winner will receive round-trip transportation and accommodations for two (2) and receive a photo opportunity with Donald J. Trump to be identified by Sponsor (approximate retail value $3000). The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit here for full details and Official Rules. name: Pete Buttigieg
subject: Why I believe in voting by mail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | Peter, While we face the most deadly pandemic our country has ever seen, Republican administrations are fighting tooth and nail against every effort to vote safely. Sadly, as the number of COVID-19 cases skyrockets, the ballot box has become increasingly dangerous for Hoosier voters. And now, we’re left with the tension between protecting our health and voting out the very administrations that created this turmoil. [**Please chip in $24 to help build the 2020 Vote-by-Mail Outreach Program.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19065031/248610601/-211952933?express_lane=true&amount=24&refcode=PeteButtigieg.VBM.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGJmOGE2NC04NWYyLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SOpfrbgdTyipDbOv4kX6S2vRnpPsme7IfbL8avXFsXc=) The GOP knows that when every Hoosier can vote, they could lose power. That’s why they’ve rejected our efforts to extend no-fault vote by mail to the general election. But, Hoosier Dems don’t wait for the GOP to tell us what we can do. We take action. That’s why I’m asking you to support the Indiana Democratic Party’s Vote-by-Mail Outreach Program. [**Please invest $16 in keeping voters safe.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19065032/248610602/-211952933?express_lane=true&amount=16&refcode=PeteButtigieg.VBM.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGJmOGE2NC04NWYyLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SOpfrbgdTyipDbOv4kX6S2vRnpPsme7IfbL8avXFsXc=) The Vote-by-Mail Outreach Program is Indiana's number one initiative dedicated to getting eligible Hoosiers the tools they need to vote by mail. But this initiative isn’t funded by dark money or special interests; it’s backed by real Hoosiers. We’re relying on donors like you to make sure eligible Hoosiers can vote safely in the 2020 election. [**Will you give $7, or whatever you can, to help minimize the risk at the ballot box this year?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19065033/248610603/-211952933?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=PeteButtigieg.VBM.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGJmOGE2NC04NWYyLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SOpfrbgdTyipDbOv4kX6S2vRnpPsme7IfbL8avXFsXc=) name: Margaret Good
subject: I stand with you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19066292/248661399/-940294256?refcode=090820-es-i-stand-ad-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmEzOTM4MS05Y2YyLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HjL-NNLbHEb-pNwd2KKMg18KpMgzMYz6MfEoE4rwkzY=&emci=b8619f51-9cf2-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=86a39381-9cf2-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)

Friend,

When you’re the little girl with big ideas, they tell you where to sit. And even when you run for State House and win, they tell you where to sit when you get there.

**No matter how many times in life people have told me where to sit, they could never tell me where to stand.**

**[Click here to watch our new digital ad about where I stand, and make a donation right now to help keep it running.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19066294/248661401/687549374?refcode2=86a39381-9cf2-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emci=b8619f51-9cf2-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=86a39381-9cf2-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&refcode=090820-es-i-stand-ad-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmEzOTM4MS05Y2YyLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HjL-NNLbHEb-pNwd2KKMg18KpMgzMYz6MfEoE4rwkzY=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19066295/248661402/687549374?refcode=090820-es-i-stand-ad-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmEzOTM4MS05Y2YyLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HjL-NNLbHEb-pNwd2KKMg18KpMgzMYz6MfEoE4rwkzY=)
In the legislature, I stood with students to save college scholarships. I’ve stood up to corporate polluters and their lobbyists to protect our water. And I stand with working people fighting the broken unemployment system to get the help they deserve.

If you’re done with politicians who will say anything to get elected, I stand with you. If you’re done with corporations writing our laws, because they buy our representatives, I stand with you.

If you’re tired of name-calling and want someone who is willing to work with anyone to get things done, I stand with you. If you believe Congress isn’t where you go to retire, it’s where you serve, I stand with you.

When I get to Congress, they will tell me where to sit again, but I will always stand with you.

Thank you for standing with me,

Margaret

[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19066297/248661404/687549374?refcode2=86a39381-9cf2-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emci=b8619f51-9cf2-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=86a39381-9cf2-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&refcode=090820-es-i-stand-ad-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmEzOTM4MS05Y2YyLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HjL-NNLbHEb-pNwd2KKMg18KpMgzMYz6MfEoE4rwkzY=)

Margaret Good for Congress
PO Box 5073
Sarasota, FL 34277
United States
Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us.
Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. **[If you'd like to donate, click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19066298/248661405/788213855?refcode=emfooter&amount=25&recurring=1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmEzOTM4MS05Y2YyLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HjL-NNLbHEb-pNwd2KKMg18KpMgzMYz6MfEoE4rwkzY=)**

body:
“Every city. Every town. Burn the precinct to the ground.” That’s the chant of the violent mob that marched through the streets of New York this week.

| | “Every city. Every town. Burn the precinct to the ground.”

That’s the chant of the violent mob that marched through the streets of New York this week.

Some of our elected leaders, like me and President Trump, are fighting back.

But many, like Bill de Blasio and Max Rose, have been silent as rioters and criminals take over our streets.

[We cannot - absolutely CANNOT - let this dangerous, anti-American gang win this November. ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=291A473A1A6227)

If you like the sound of “Every city. Every town. Burn the precinct to the ground.” then vote for my opponent please.

[But if you want elected officials who fight back and put an end to this hateful rhetoric and violence, who will support peaceful speech and work together to build a safer more prosperous America for everyone, then step up because it is now or never. I can’t do this alone, and if these people win then I don’t know what America looks like after election day.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=291A473A1A6227)

body:
Tap or click to read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/7ee1fc05505370a8/6026fcac56af6dffc3d6b838967d376c/33153) Have you heard the news? Last night, **we emerged VICTORIOUS in the Republican Primary for U.S. Senate!**
Unfortunately, there isn’t time to rest on our laurels. As we speak, the Democrats are propping up D.C. Jeanne Shaheen with outside money to defend her seat.
They know that the path to a Senate majority runs through New Hampshire, and I’m going to give them the fight of their lifetime.
But Peter, I need YOUR help to make waves. There are less than two months until the General Election, and the Democrats already have a leg up on us with their online fundraising.

As we speak, the Democrats are propping up D.C. Jeanne Shaheen with outside money to defend her seat. They know that the path to a Senate majority runs through New Hampshire, and I’m going to give them the fight of their lifetime. But Peter, I need YOUR help to make waves. There are less than two months until the General Election, and the Democrats already have a leg up on us with their online fundraising. Your contribution has never been more important as we sprint to the finish line in November. Friend,

My campaign manager is about to launch a bold new mobilization strategy that would allow us to make critical investments in our community in the final 56 days of this election.

**In campaign time, 55 days is no time at all -- and this election day is incredibly consequential.**

We need all hands on deck to deliver the change our communities so desperately need -- and that means we need you in this fight too, friend.

If you haven’t already, read my campaign manager’s email -- and chip in if you can right now to help us get to where we need. I’m honored to be fighting alongside you:

>
> → We’re aggressively increasing our digital organizing metrics to ensure Sri’s message makes it to every corner of our district
>
> → We’re setting up a voter protection program to combat voter suppression efforts by our opponents
>
But the extent to which we can accomplish these goals is dependent on you, friend. [**In order to scale up our campaign the way we plan to, we need your help -- and so we’re asking you to chip in immediately to help us mobilize as quickly as possible.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19071409/248741040/1226323243?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.09_b1_sma3_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTY4M2Q4My1iM2YyLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fC9R1F-IzBUG0po3RyHZeSlBqmyJx-ty1aQd0LT0gg0=)

We have 56 days left, friend -- and we need your help.

Thanks,
Allen

**Can you make it weekly?**

clean_body: Friend, My campaign manager is about to launch a bold new mobilization strategy that would allow us to make critical investments in our community in the final 56 days of this election. In campaign time, 55 days is no time at all -- and this election day is incredibly consequential. We need all hands on deck to deliver the change our communities so desperately need -- and that means we need you in this fight too, friend. If you haven’t already, read my campaign manager’s email -- and chip in if you can right now to help us get to where we need. That’s how much time we have left to win this fight and send a real candidate for change to Congress. And if you’re thinking that’s not a lot of time, you’re absolutely right. Look at it this way, friend: We have exactly 56 days left to expand our digital organizing program, ensure that our grassroots message reaches new voters, and counter the millions of dollars in outside spending flooding this race. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = How do we plan to do that? → We’re planning a ramp-up of our mail, digital, and television messaging initiatives to counter the ad spending by outside groups trying to drown out Sri’s message of expanding access to affordable health care and other common-sense solutions our families need. → We’re aggressively increasing our digital organizing metrics to ensure Sri’s message makes it to every corner of our district → We’re setting up a voter protection program to combat voter suppression efforts by our opponents But the extent to which we can accomplish these goals is dependent on you, friend. = = We have 56 days left, friend -- and we need your help. Thanks, Allen Can you make it weekly? Friend -- we’re just 8 weeks away from Election Day, and every dollar that comes through the door is immediately going back out to help us flip this seat. Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit here for full details and Official Rules. name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Jamaal Bowman
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
Jamaal and I are ready to take on Congress -- but we can’t get there without your help.
#

Friends,
**I’m reaching out today to ask if you can split a contribution between myself and my good friend, Jamaal Bowman. Here’s a link you can use:**
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-jb](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19074372/248778832/-430135297?refcode2=56221f7d-bff2-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&refcode=em200909-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjIyMWY3ZC1iZmYyLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5V6DiYIBvnzLT8x4DgJLxSJbzXmCZzO-SggcgDMojCE=)**
Jamaal is running next door in New York’s 16th Congressional District, and we’re passionate about many of the same issues.
We’re both Black men, raised in public housing by single moms. We’ve both committed our careers to serving our communities — Jamaal as a founding middle school principal and education activist, myself as a lawyer and community activist.
We both know firsthand what it’s like to struggle to get by. That’s why we are unrepentant fighters for Medicare for All and the Green New Deal, creating more affordable housing, raising the minimum wage, and expanding opportunities for all Americans.
Another thing Jamaal and I have in common is that neither of us take corporate PAC contributions. That means we rely on grassroots supporters like you giving whatever you can afford to power our movement.
**In Congress, Jamaal and I will fight together to change the status quo — but neither of us can get there without your help.**
**[Please split a contribution between our campaigns to help send both of us to Congress to make good trouble and bring meaningful, progressive change to this country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19074373/248778833/-430135297?refcode2=56221f7d-bff2-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&refcode=em200909-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjIyMWY3ZC1iZmYyLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5V6DiYIBvnzLT8x4DgJLxSJbzXmCZzO-SggcgDMojCE=)**
Thank you for your support. Jamaal and I are thrilled to have you fighting alongside us.
Mondaire

That means we rely on grassroots supporters like you giving whatever you can afford to power our movement. In Congress, Jamaal and I will fight together to change the status quo — but neither of us can get there without your help. = Thank you for your support. Jamaal and I are thrilled to have you fighting alongside us. Mondaire = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress P.O. Box 933 Nyack, NY 10960 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Mondaire with a contribution, =.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Will=20Douglas=20for=20State=20House?=
subject: Will Douglas Endorsed by NFIB and TXOGA
body:
National Federation of Independent Business and Texas Oil & Gas Association endorses Will Douglas in Texas House District 113 | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/willdouglasfortexas/nfib-txoga-9-9-2020?e=4f010155df)
---
| | [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=7e51986c41&e=4f010155df)
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
September 9, 2020
---
**CONTACT:[Trevor Naglieri](mailto:trevor@highpostgroup.com?subject=Will%20Douglas%20\(TX-HD-113\))**
(508) 826-5135
---
| **Will Douglas Announces Endorsements from NFIB and TXOGA**
**Dallas, TX** – Today, Will Douglas, Republican nominee for Texas House District 113, announced endorsements from two leading organizations representing small business and our world-leading energy industry: the NFIB TX PAC and The Texas Oil & Gas Association Good Government Committee.

_**Annie Spilman, National Federation of Independent Business (NFIB) State Director, said:**_
“As small businesses struggle now more than ever to keep their doors open and people employed, it’s critical that we elect leaders in our communities who will fight to keep taxes and burdensome regulations at bay. That is why the NFIB TX PAC proudly supports Will Douglas in his race for Texas House District 113. As a small business owner, he intimately understands the daily struggles employers face operating on thin margins, while trying to keep their focus on their employees and customers and be profitable. Will Douglas is the candidate who supports policies that continue to support economic growth and our communities.”

_**Todd Staples, treasurer of the TXOGA PAC, said:**_
“Will Douglas understands jobs for Texans and a strong economy are possible with robust energy development and common-sense environmental stewardship. For our state to remain strong, policies must ensure Texas remains the leader in our nation’s quest for affordable, reliable and dependable energy, which is only possible with responsible oil and natural gas development. The Texas Oil & Gas Association Good Government Committee is pleased to support Will Douglas for State Representative.”

_**Will Douglas, Republican nominee for Texas House District 113, said:**_
"I am honored and humbled to receive the endorsements of the NFIB and TXOGA in this important race. The NFIB and TXOGA understand we need business-minded leaders in the Texas House to help get our economy going again, and I look forward to partnering with them to deliver real results for the people of Texas."

_**BACKGROUND:**_

**NFIB/Texas** has 21,000 dues-paying members representing a cross-section of the state’s economy from agriculture, construction, and manufacturing to wholesale, retail, and services. Additionally, NFIB/Texas membership is 96 percent comprised of businesses who have 40 employees or less and is the largest association advocating for small business in the Capitol. [www.nfib.com/texas/](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=4b448510f9&e=4f010155df)

**The Texas Oil & Gas Association (TXOGA)** is a statewide trade association representing every facet of the Texas oil and gas industry including small independents and major producers. Collectively, the membership of TXOGA produces in excess of 80 percent of Texas’ crude oil and natural gas, operates over 80 percent of the state’s refining capacity, and is responsible for the vast majority of the state’s pipelines. In fiscal year 2019, the oil and natural gas industry supported more than 428,000 direct jobs and paid more than $16 billion in state and local taxes and state royalties – the highest total in Texas history – funding our state’s schools, roads and first responders. [www.txoga.org/about-us/](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=b75000d46a&e=4f010155df)

**Will Douglas** is a self-made pharmacy owner and graduate of the University of Oklahoma College of Pharmacy. Through hard work and long hours, Will purchased several small pharmacies and currently manages his own business, Crimson Care Pharmacy Group. Named one of Dallas County’s “40 under 40,” Will is running for office to ensure the next generation of Texans can live in a state where the economy is strong and our communities are safe. [www.willdouglasfortexas.com](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=c756a07cc7&e=4f010155df) ###
---
| | | | | | | [](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=02143bb46d&e=4f010155df)
---
| | [](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=36ecc31999&e=4f010155df)

Throughout this campaign, you have all gotten to know me. However, this campaign is not a solo project - | | |

| | Throughout this campaign, you have all gotten to know me. However, this is not a solo project - there are a bunch of friendly faces who have been organizing this campaign behind the scenes!

Some of you may have had the pleasure of meeting a few of them, but not all of you have, so I wanted to formally introduce you all to my wonderful team!

However, I do have one quick ask: we need money. We need the financial resources to keep this team going into the final couple of months of this campaign. **Your donation will help fund our field team's thousands of weekly calls, our digital team's online ads, and our communications team's television ads.** [I hope I can count on you to chip in.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=e54e3228cb&e=140a9b81e7)

body:

| | |
### Friend,

Last month, our founder, Simona, *graced* the cover of Mother Magazine. In case you didn’t get your copy, one of our new [masks](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=8a9dfc9c3c&e=3f151f8b74) was included in the feature!

Our [store ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=3427e3ee3b&e=3f151f8b74)is now open and stocked with the best Moms in Office merch yet -- from tees and totes to the ‘Moms Are Essential’ masks like the one in the feature. Our current favorite? The Katie Porter pop art range, of course.

With just weeks until the election, we’re thinking of all the ways to support the candidates that represent us and the needs of our families.

**[Visit our store](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=fb2a7da9e2&e=3f151f8b74) today and show some love to your favorites in style! And don’t forget to send us your selfies!**

Moms in Office

Hey, friend,

All I can say is wow.

After months of hard work, we did it. We won the primary election!

The primary was the only thing standing between me and Chris Pappas. Now, I’m ready to take him on in the general election in November.

Winning the primary was tough, but it doesn’t hold a candle to what lies ahead. I’m going to need all the help I can get from my Granite State grassroots army.

If you are able, help me hit the ground running by chipping in to my campaign today. No amount is too small, even $1 can help us start strong. name: Lisa Scheller
subject: LATINOS FOR SCHELLER
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
**LISA SCHELLER RELEASES SIXTH COALITION TODAY “LATINOS FOR SCHELLER”** **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Brooke Race Info@schellerforcongress.com **Allentown, Pa. –** Today, the Scheller Campaign is proud to announce its sixth coalition, Latinos for Scheller. Lisa Scheller strongly stands with the Latino community. The Chairman of this coalition is Tim Ramos who is a lifelong Allentown resident, raised right in Center City. Tim was a steelworker, truck driver, and self-taught in computer hardware repair, and previous small business owner. Tim released the following statement: “I believe what we are lacking in America is a leadership that is willing to make tough calls and hard decisions. We need a leadership that wants true change and isn't afraid of standing on things like morals and principles. That’s why I am voting for Lisa Scheller. I believe she possesses the ability, tenacity, and leadership that we need. Not only is she the right fit for PA District 7, but for Americans all across the country who are looking to Congress to make decisions that support everyday Americans.” [JOIN LATINOS FOR SCHELLER](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=f7ef2a6fae8f41e1941eba440356c8a6&_e=lbVjxVlavXX0sV2tOasRrstij7sTzSImGehYEgTecYneks361rDUI9Vp1ovA8m0YcIyCRDCSfkmFrOF9TZZner2fSfQYORh4Smg6wlHGRBcvVn7QRUq6gy-vcvJZLbPIPJq1gJDucErn4g8AXTEQualR4FF01DuCzRK-AljeK9u35i88UKOw_u2jqpwQTI7grG-L_ixOz4m0tmoEaF6Fq7uRwrKxKeh_thOnvN_wvPIn8EbupkpC_4S3q5JxWyP4biCwJbglnpi4Lh3kIIEek6Z0yNPg1vk2C-SVHSvBuvk%3D) Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc. clean_body: LISA SCHELLER RELEASES SIXTH COALITION TODAY “LATINOS FOR SCHELLER” FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Brooke Race Info@schellerforcongress.com Allentown, Pa. – Today, the Scheller Campaign is proud to announce its sixth coalition, Latinos for Scheller. Lisa Scheller strongly stands with the Latino community. The Chairman of this coalition is Tim Ramos who is a lifelong Allentown resident, raised right in Center City. Tim was a steelworker, truck driver, and self-taught in computer hardware repair, and previous small business owner. Tim released the following statement: “I believe what we are lacking in America is a leadership that is willing to make tough calls and hard decisions. We need a leadership that wants true change and isn't afraid of standing on things like morals and principles. That’s why I am voting for Lisa Scheller. I believe she possesses the ability, tenacity, and leadership that we need. Not only is she the right fit for PA District 7, but for Americans all across the country who are looking to Congress to make decisions that support everyday Americans.” Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc.

name: Protect Freedom PAC
subject: PRESS: Protect Freedom PAC endorses Congressman Chip Roy in TX-21
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: September 9, 2020
---
| Contact: Michael Biundo michael@rightvoter.com, 202-809-6014
---
| |
---
| Protect Freedom PAC Endorses Congressman Chip Roy in TX-21
---
|
---
| Athens, GA - Protect Freedom PAC, an independent organization dedicated to supporting pro-liberty and freedom-minded candidates, has endorsed Congressman Chip Roy in TX-21 for re-election.
Protect Freedom PAC is planning independent expenditure campaigns totaling $5 million for the 2020 election cycle.
Protect Freedom PAC spokesman Michael Biundo stated:
"Congressman Chip Roy is a genuine conservative that will continue to stand up for our liberties in Congress. As a Congressman, Roy has been a leader in working to defend our Constitutional freedoms. If elected to another term in Congress, we know we will have a strong voice for liberty with Chip in Congress."
Protect Freedom PAC endorsed and supported candidates for statewide and federal office in a half dozen states in 2018 and looks to expand its reach for the 2020 cycle. The organization was founded by a team of veterans of the Donald Trump, Ron Paul, and Rand Paul campaigns for President.
---
| | |
---
| Protect Freedom PAC was founded for the purpose of supporting pro-freedom and liberty-minded candidates using the tactics, technology, and strategy that best fits each race individually. PFP was founded by seasoned political veterans with decades of national campaign experience, which includes working on the campaigns of both Ron and Rand Paul.
---
| |
---
| ###
---
|
---
| | Protect Freedom PAC | 196 Alps Rd, Ste 2-244, Athens, GA 30606
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: September 9, 2020 | Contact: Michael Biundo michael@rightvoter.com, 202-809-6014 | | | Protect Freedom PAC Endorses Congressman Chip Roy in TX-21 | | Athens, GA - Protect Freedom PAC, an independent organization dedicated to supporting pro-liberty and freedom-minded candidates, has endorsed Congressman Chip Roy in TX-21 for re-election. Protect Freedom PAC is planning independent expenditure campaigns totaling $5 million for the 2020 election cycle. Protect Freedom PAC spokesman Michael Biundo stated: "Congressman Chip Roy is a genuine conservative that will continue to stand up for our liberties in Congress. As a Congressman, Roy has been a leader in working to defend our Constitutional freedoms. If elected to another term in Congress, we know we will have a strong voice for liberty with Chip in Congress." Protect Freedom PAC endorsed and supported candidates for statewide and federal office in a half dozen states in 2018 and looks to expand its reach for the 2020 cycle. The organization was founded by a team of veterans of the Donald Trump, Ron Paul, and Rand Paul campaigns for President. | | | | Protect Freedom PAC was founded for the purpose of supporting pro-freedom and liberty-minded candidates using the tactics, technology, and strategy that best fits each race individually. PFP was founded by seasoned political veterans with decades of national campaign experience, which includes working on the campaigns of both Ron and Rand Paul. | | | ### | | | Protect Freedom PAC | 196 Alps Rd, Ste 2-244, Athens, GA 30606 | | Sent by mailto:info@protectfreedompac.com powered by

Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e84e/77d4c309/21a464a5/2635e071/3369921147/VEsHAQ/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e84e/77d4c309/21a464a5/2635e070/3369921147/VEsHAA/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e84e/77d4c309/21a464a5/2635e073/3369921147/VEsHAw/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

7117 Farnam St, Ste. 2, Omaha, NE 68132
info@eastmanforcongress.com

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Add your name: Recommit to the fight against climate change
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
"Summer is hot, but this is different."
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8145%2E868730%2E6HwObC) Friend, In almost every corner of the country, Americans are feeling the effects of the climate crisis. In the Midwest this summer, folks faced down a deadly derecho that flattened towns and ruined farms. Along the Gulf, Louisianans and Texans faced a Category 4 hurricane -- something they're becoming all too familiar with. In California, Oregon, and right here in Washington, residents are fleeing raging wildfires -- in what has become an annual tragedy -- or coughing on smoke that's clogging the air up and down the coast. Anywhere else? Either too much rain or not enough has meant flooded streets or dried up crops. Our oceans are warming, which makes hurricanes more powerful. Our weather patterns are less predictable, which makes for stronger storms and wildfires. Americans are facing down extreme weather fueled by climate change amidst a global pandemic, which could also become more common due to climate change. **I've committed my life and my career to ending the climate crisis. I'm more committed now than ever because this year has shown what we're facing when national leaders don't act.[If you believe we must end the climate crisis before it's too late, add your name right now to recommit to the fight against climate change right now.](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/fight-against-climate-crisis/?utm_source=ema_2020-09-09_climate&source=ema_2020-09-09_climate&utm_campaign=climate&utm_medium=ema&t=4&akid=8145%2E868730%2E6HwObC)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/fight-against-climate-crisis/?utm_source=ema_2020-09-09_climate&source=ema_2020-09-09_climate&utm_campaign=climate&utm_medium=ema&t=5&akid=8145%2E868730%2E6HwObC)
---
It's hard to think that just one thing is really fueling the fires -- metaphorically and literally -- behind this year's extreme weather. But just one thing is: heat.
At least 140 weather stations across the Western United States noted record high temperatures this summer, and one in Death Valley reached 130 degrees. That's one of the hottest places on Earth, right here in our own country.
I really can't even put it better than the National Weather Service did on Twitter: _"Yeah, it's summer, and summer is hot, but this is different. These are dangerous conditions."_
But the truth is, things will get more dangerous. Temperatures will continue to rise, and weather will continue to worsen (especially if we get four more years of a president who refuses to even acknowledge the danger, let alone take action on it) -- unless we commit to large-scale changes.
**[I'm committed. Are you? Add your name to recommit to the fight against climate change right now.](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/fight-against-climate-crisis/?utm_source=ema_2020-09-09_climate&source=ema_2020-09-09_climate&utm_campaign=climate&utm_medium=ema&t=6&akid=8145%2E868730%2E6HwObC)**
Very truly yours,
Jay

clean_body: "Summer is hot, but this is different." | Friend, In almost every corner of the country, Americans are feeling the effects of the climate crisis. In the Midwest this summer, folks faced down a deadly derecho that flattened towns and ruined farms. Along the Gulf, Louisianans and Texans faced a Category 4 hurricane -- something they're becoming all too familiar with. In California, Oregon, and right here in Washington, residents are fleeing raging wildfires -- in what has become an annual tragedy -- or coughing on smoke that's clogging the air up and down the coast. Anywhere else? Either too much rain or not enough has meant flooded streets or dried up crops. Our oceans are warming, which makes hurricanes more powerful. Our weather patterns are less predictable, which makes for stronger storms and wildfires. Americans are facing down extreme weather fueled by climate change amidst a global pandemic, which could also become more common due to climate change. I've committed my life and my career to ending the climate crisis. I'm more committed now than ever because this year has shown what we're facing when national leaders don't act. | It's hard to think that just one thing is really fueling the fires -- metaphorically and literally -- behind this year's extreme weather. But just one thing is: heat. At least 140 weather stations across the Western United States noted record high temperatures this summer, and one in Death Valley reached 130 degrees. That's one of the hottest places on Earth, right here in our own country. I really can't even put it better than the National Weather Service did on Twitter: "Yeah, it's summer, and summer is hot, but this is different. These are dangerous conditions." But the truth is, things will get more dangerous. Temperatures will continue to rise, and weather will continue to worsen (especially if we get four more years of a president who refuses to even acknowledge the danger, let alone take action on it) -- unless we commit to large-scale changes. Very truly yours, Jay

In order to spread the word, this weekend, we launched our new ad, “Stand Up for New Mexico”, and we need your help to keep it on air and push back on the LIES from far-left Pelosi Democrat, Ben Ray Lujan. Please help us meet our goal of raising $5,250 by the end of the day today , so we can keep this ad on television and ensure every voter in the state hears about Ben Ray’s out-of-touch DC voting record. | Ben Ray spent years climbing Nancy Pelosi’s party ladder in Washington so he could become her Assistant Speaker of the House. In doing so, he put Far-Left San Francisco policies over the desires and needs of the people of New Mexico. I will always put the people of New Mexico first , even when it goes against what the DC insiders want. I need your help to spread the word about our movement and to keep this ad on air. | Friends,

Politico has officially shifted our race from Lean Democrat to Toss-Up!

We are building momentum and are cementing ourselves as one of the most competitive campaigns in the country. With a race this close, any level of help makes a huge difference. [Will you chip in $25, $50 or even $10 to keep this race competitive?](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=1c24a1edf0&e=16fac31a0f) With your help we will flip this district!

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Trump Nominated for Nobel Peace Prize Following Israel-UAE Accord
body:
President Trump has been nominated for the Nobel Peace Prize for helping broker a peace deal between Israel and the United Arab Emirates | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5e87b2f9c1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Trump Nominated for Nobel Peace Prize Following Israel-UAE Accord**

“President Trump has been nominated for the Nobel Peace Prize for helping broker a peace deal between Israel and the United Arab Emirates,” Yaron Steinbuch reports for the _New York Post_.

Christian Tybring-Gjedde, a member of the Norwegian Parliament, submitted the nomination. “For his merit, I think he has done more trying to create peace between nations than most other Peace Prize nominees,” Tybring-Gjedde told Fox News.

“Indeed, Trump has broken a 39-year-old streak of American Presidents either starting a war or bringing the United States into an international armed conflict.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=82379f68af&e=3ee4985eea)

**MORE** : [**Israel, UAE to Sign Historic Peace Deal in White House Ceremony**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e43a4eaa9f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “We are living in a climate of animus against the police. The result is already apparent in soaring crime rates, most notably in those cities where local police are most heavily under attack with demands to ‘defund’ their departments. It will only get worse . . . Like the 32 children already killed by armed criminals this year in Chicago alone,” Mike Brake writes for [_National Review_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=21e7853c7a&e=3ee4985eea) _._
---
|
---
| “The Trump administration has pursued some needed changes in education policy (most notably through regulatory rollbacks) to the benefit of higher education in particular. Many of these efforts represent important steps toward choosing the path of free markets and family control in education,” education experts Lindsey Burke, Jonathan Butcher, and Mary Clare Amselem write in [_The Daily Signal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=af3f20eb4b&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “On Sunday, Atlantic Editor in Chief Jeffrey Goldberg admitted the White House’s account that President Trump’s trip to a cemetery of fallen World War I soldiers in France in 2018 was modified due to bad weather is probably accurate,” Jordan Davidson reports. Goldberg’s article had claimed the opposite. Read more in [_The Federalist_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2ca9b651c3&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Christianna=2C=20Team=20Dani?=
subject: ICYMI: Send a Letter to the Editor in support of Dani!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f3c0aa7927b9/we-need-youto-write-an-lte-3911602?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| | Hi there #TeamDani! I wanted to make sure that you saw our email from earlier this week about letters to the editor! **Check it out, and sign up to write an LTE for Dani today!**

As we get closer to Election Day and the campaign starts heating up (did you see that there will be a debate at the end of the month?!) we need all hands on deck. That means we need to make our support for Dani heard on social media, at events, and **in the newspaper**. This is where you come in.

In the next two months, we are kicking off a HUGE Letter to the Editor (LTE) writing campaign. **LTEs are the perfect way to get involved** , especially if phonebanking is not your thing, or you don't have enough time to commit to a big stack of postcards - we can do it together!

If you are interested - or think you might be interested - sign up [here](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=b929f3cdee&e=140a9b81e7) and we will reach out. We have examples, drafts, and a big list of topics to choose from.

On to November!

Christianna Dyer
Digital Organizer, Team Dani

Violent communists are burning down cities across the country from New York to Kenosha. **If these socialists win this election, the rioting will only get worse.** Control of the Senate means control of America's political future. Republicans must retain control, or we will watch the socialist left defund the police and take every last freedom from us. Our campaign has put together a new ad highlighting the importance of the election this year, and I'm hoping you'll help me get it on the air. The liberal mayor of New York City has announced a billion dollar cut to the NYPD budget. Meanwhile, violent crime is at its highest level since the 90's! **If Democrats win this election, they will defund the police and allow rioters and looters to roam free nationwide. ****
** Our ad highlights the difference between these socialists and Oklahomans who believe in supporting our police, and standing for our flag. [**Can you help me get this ad seen by the voters of Oklahoma? Contribute $50 to our campaign right now to help us get this video seen on social media.**](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNTA2NTMwODg2NzUxODg0NTI1JmM9aTR0NiZlPTE5MjgmYj00MDUxNTE2MTkmZD1lM3A1djZn.2ntHjRQwYqZ6GAztlsZHfdR49_qHJ8RCrpYmgcLHnpY) Liberals are spending hundreds of millions of dollars trying to take control of the Senate this year. They think they can flip Oklahoma blue! I know grassroots conservatives like you have my back, but this election is going to be close, and I need your help to reach more voters. We need to get this message in front of the independents that will be deciding this race. I need your support to make that possible. name: Nancy Mace
subject: VICTORY on DRILLING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress |
body:
President Trump invited me to Florida to be at an event he knew was VERY important to me, and to all of you in the Lowcountry. | |
---
[ ](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=ae407b08b66946c68b6d07d4a9bc54f0&_e=2x-G7reU1DHIt_sJv8kbKHRqFHJcnkmVz65iItA51WMpQ6wOYzjNosX0SfL9ccTro6vo99ARkmyTHIl02zoCgtTZsTQgoQOk_VT7kr9LrBrtnufVjabCSJV0PNwGGa34BbOZUiW5UrTd81_UabuKBIouqmMFwxAZ4I-NMhmS5nWb1zmm2JHwQL0p66eic_prxvYx39GoRwyrBYg0h9QVrzs8EhCIo4RRuQx6Q13fg2wv3UGxto-g6b0d2VHLnb7gNLexFYY0cO2lAloq_9fgb2BOdU4JfFV1OvloYUzFmf77bkrKcxX8ycZ8n3MwlF6LMbG3wyHmRd9v_51t7Txf-nPFxHW99Lf00VlA87-vefhfC-ElEZyEIwCn9sdA8YV2yXWdLi9-Rq_SqV71xkuw-NLWCKYFoJzZUzaGGr5VSajio_dnbPtGOyEYNf-r-o786-cp068dV4oCnJHO3JDGCrszJHeU7YXTOUyb8tElnR4%3D)
|
---
Friend,

I’ve been against offshore drilling on our coastlines from Day 1. Unlike our current Congressman though, I want to see REAL, lasting, bipartisan progress on ending drilling. I’m not in it for talking points or legislation only Nancy Pelosi could love.

_That’s why yesterday was so important to me, and to our district._

You see, President Trump invited me to Florida to be at an event he knew was **VERY** important to me, and to all of you in the Lowcountry.

At that event, he signed a moratorium on offshore drilling off of South Carolina’s coastline through at least 2032!

I’ve sponsored legislation to ban drilling on our coastline. Our state elected officials are united in their opposition. And I will always work to get the job done — with both parties, with the administration!
[ ](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=ae407b08b66946c68b6d07d4a9bc54f0&_e=2x-G7reU1DHIt_sJv8kbKHRqFHJcnkmVz65iItA51WMpQ6wOYzjNosX0SfL9ccTro6vo99ARkmyTHIl02zoCgtTZsTQgoQOk_VT7kr9LrBrtnufVjabCSJV0PNwGGa34BbOZUiW5UrTd81_UabuKBIouqmMFwxAZ4I-NMhmS5nWb1zmm2JHwQL0p66eic_prxvYx39GoRwyrBYg0h9QVrzs8EhCIo4RRuQx6Q13fg2wv3UGxto-g6b0d2VHLnb7gNLexFYY0cO2lAloq_9fgbxwpu_Ce7BORYiaQN0YTGgS_HW2Cpa6z5VpJK0Ou9whTAGwRUh_p0jtyg14NBnwfp3-fuoF8g9H32TmQfmIXGoV4p0b2cz3wr-xqei_qUlTwbbl4pP9RXrfjTBSNqyqycxzuSW8vn3z17voyZ-G0IDOraXICSzeDy8822GzK6g_ArGLA6Kg8RkAjXhC4NQWLttZ2dymkFeIpgHBC4f7hU7g%3D)
For all of us in the Lowcountry, this has been a long time coming. We had a chance to get this policy through Congress the way we got it through in Columbia — but our Congressman chose to promote a gimmicky bill that couldn’t pass. He chose a partisan talking point over progress.

Not me.

_My first rally as a state lawmaker was an anti-offshore drilling rally. _

_The first piece of legislation I filed as a state lawmaker was an anti-offshore drilling measure. _

_I have a 100% rating from the Conservation Voters of SC, and I will always fight for clean air, clean water, and for our beautiful SC coastline._
[ ](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=ae407b08b66946c68b6d07d4a9bc54f0&_e=2x-G7reU1DHIt_sJv8kbKHRqFHJcnkmVz65iItA51WMpQ6wOYzjNosX0SfL9ccTro6vo99ARkmyTHIl02zoCgtTZsTQgoQOk_VT7kr9LrBrtnufVjabCSJV0PNwGGa34BbOZUiW5UrTd81_UabuKBIouqmMFwxAZ4I-NMhmS5nWb1zmm2JHwQL0p66eic_prxvYx39GoRwyrBYg0h9QVrzs8EhCIo4RRuQx6Q13fg2wv3UGxto-g6b0d2VHLnb7gNLexFYY0cO2lAloq_9fgb2WIDPMPBlayJKmF74BAvLONbQenM4aF_TsyoYB9NEo4WD_7q3eeGCnuEZUgnXDw53I-t4BaR0kuQyDP4Grst_MgS2FaEjt1qMuEfiPUl8fsNEb2TKMIaa_1vvmiiVL6VeSA0-N6wF2CbMOgFVPxLgu5Ov6X4Lzq3EyX0SMyJyyt9Il3qCoaLVrEBKTOREhAtuOwe5tzu4Kg3yvMjEsLB8A%3D)
I want to thank President Trump and his administration for the invitation to this historic announcement putting in place a moratorium through at least 2032 that will protect our coastline from offshore drilling.

**I want to thank all of you for being outspoken on this issue. **

And I want to let you know — this is how I will represent you in Congress. Hard work and results, not partisan talking points and gimmicks.

I hope to earn your vote and your support.

Nancy
---
---
| |
---
| Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress |
| 295 Seven Farms Drive C-186 Charleston, SC 29492 |
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com |
| [Unsubscribe](http://links.email.nancymace.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_s=ae407b08b66946c68b6d07d4a9bc54f0&_t=hczR5OdUsdfg1W6MNyboOePqs3LpWjgwLAbwGBBNoJESgkdy5bPN6eei-yZr8PbmWhrH1PZUD_1ls268kv9nID7dbyLzUtHBB5V6Nj6hM6v73GuWpBSQ8_DZnkIyroNxnOSB0WNGlA1fUsPBz0oEmjBMAa3zXCZGSRUdZIm0yAA%3D) |
