name: MJ Hegar Team Update
subject: So much yet to do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
So much we've accomplished together.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f9b/7f51f7bc/428a5415/4efa3bdb/1570940750/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Thanks to supporters like you, Peter, the last few weeks have been full of momentum.

On September 3rd, we had our best online fundraising day of the campaign, raising over $225,000 in a single day! We ALSO hit a big milestone, with over 150,000 donors in this grassroots army. While Sen. Cornyn has special interests propping him up, we have an army of donors just like you in this fight alongside MJ.

MJ traveled to the Rio Grande Valley to meet with local officials and health professionals to see firsthand how COVID-19 and the recent flooding have caused huge issues for the area. | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f9b/7f51f7bc/428a5415/4efa3bda/1570940750/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwNjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200909.2nd__2068__&amount=10")
---
She listened as the local health care professionals described the pain of the constant stream of COVID-19 deaths and how Sen. Cornyn hadn't even reached out to them. We need a senator who will listen to health care professionals and represent ALL parts of Texas.

MJ also hosted virtual events to reach folks all across Texas -- listening to their concerns, building connections, and continuing to fulfill her promise to Texans that she will represent ALL of us.
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f9b/7f51f7bc/428a5415/4efa3bda/1570940750/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwNjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200909.2nd__2068__&amount=10")
---
With polls tightening and only one month before Texans start heading to the voting booths, we need to do everything we can to ensure MJ will represent us. **[Will you pitch in to keep our momentum going strong and to DEFEAT Sen. Cornyn on November 3rd?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f9b/7f51f7bc/428a5415/4efa3bda/1570940750/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwNjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200909.2nd__2068__&amount=10")**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f9b/7f51f7bc/428a5415/4efa3bd9/1570940750/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwNjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200909.2nd__2068__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f9b/7f51f7bc/428a5415/4efa3bd8/1570940750/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwNjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200909.2nd__2068__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f9b/7f51f7bc/428a5415/4efa3bdf/1570940750/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwNjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200909.2nd__2068__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f9b/7f51f7bc/428a5415/4efa3bde/1570940750/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwNjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200909.2nd__2068__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f9b/7f51f7bc/428a5415/4efa3bdd/1570940750/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwNjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200909.2nd__2068__")**
\-- Team MJ

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f9b/7f51f7bc/428a5415/4efa3bda/1570940750/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwNjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200909.2nd__2068__&amount=10")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f9b/7f51f7bc/428a5415/4efa3bdc/1570940750/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwNjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=2068&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f9b/7f51f7bc/428a5415/4efa3bd3/1570940750/VEsHBw/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

subject: Your Taxes are Going UP!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee
body:
. . . unless you choose to stop it! Friend, This November, there is a large tax hike coming . . . unless you choose to stop it! Tom O’Halleran’s voting record says it all. **O’Halleran voted AGAINST giving hard-working Arizonans a tax break _but voted during the pandemic to give tax breaks to Pelosi’s millionaire friends in California._** Now, O’Halleran is supporting Biden who has stated time and time again that he will raise taxes. We must draw the line, friend. **[Tell O’Halleran that we hard-working Arizonans CAN’T AFFORD | Trail Update
---
| Friends, It was a pleasure to see so many of you on the campaign trail this week.
I was able to visit the Putnam Republican Club where I spoke about my plan to provide rural broadband and how I will be a strong advocate for Putnam County.
My team also went to the Marion County Trump Victory HQ. They shared an update on the campaign and could feel the energy in the building for our campaign.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TeCaSdULz5WqvKrHkRVR-gtkIiA4pOeZ3MTQwHY7d2aGZ24QKx7G2TifMelGDBkgBSPxEL0RrCWhTiMlteUQ5LdqkH0sQ4jKTqhG14Uwqty3I4Z6vQuEhKde_gS3IHv3ba19dqADKO0KD5dRACAG3qaiAaR41TmN1i8sypN_8T9cXP-PltoofwuE8vk_95gC&c=qiY-LCzxE6b-rEMEef1nCfWmB3peNzZS9xz_Pbq-yFq2kQpqJ0cWiA==&ch=kaFNZYw66I3Is3n5lB_68Eo539WCUHJIReI2GrQARqwSEINuTfzncQ==)
---
| I spent a couple of days last week at the Florida Forestry Association Convention. It was an honor to be with so many people who support our agriculture. In Washington, you can count on my support for agricultural issues.
As we get closer to November, I hope to see each of you on the campaign trail. If you see me at an event near you, please be sure to say hello!
God Bless,
Kat

| Please join us at our Campaign Headquarters on September 10th from 6:30 to 8:30PM. Our list of special guests includes:
Senator Dennis Baxley Todd Chase Sheriff Bobby Schultz Mayor Gib Coerper Ed Braddy Stafford Jones Tim Marden Ryan Chamberlin Joe Harding Jennifer Bradley Sheriff Gordon Smith Senator Keith Perry ...and many more!
If you would like to attend, please send your RSVP to Faith at faith@katforcongress.com or 772.285.5001.
Our office is located behind the Zaxby's on 43rd Street in the plaza with 43rd Street Deli.

clean_body: You don't want to miss this. | | | | | | | == | | | == | | | | Trail Update | Friends, It was a pleasure to see so many of you on the campaign trail this week. I was able to visit the Putnam Republican Club where I spoke about my plan to provide rural broadband and how I will be a strong advocate for Putnam County. My team also went to the Marion County Trump Victory HQ. They shared an update on the campaign and could feel the energy in the building for our campaign. | == | I spent a couple of days last week at the Florida Forestry Association Convention. It was an honor to be with so many people who support our agriculture. In Washington, you can count on my support for agricultural issues. As we get closer to November, I hope to see each of you on the campaign trail. If you see me at an event near you, please be sure to say hello! God Bless, Kat | General Election Kick Off | == | Please join us at our Campaign Headquarters on September 10th from 6:30 to 8:30PM. Our list of special guests includes: Senator Dennis Baxley Todd Chase Sheriff Bobby Schultz Mayor Gib Coerper Ed Braddy Stafford Jones Tim Marden Ryan Chamberlin Joe Harding Jennifer Bradley Sheriff Gordon Smith Senator Keith Perry ...and many more! If you would like to attend, please send your RSVP to Faith at faith@katforcongress.com or 772.285.5001. Our office is located behind the Zaxby's on 43rd Street in the plaza with 43rd Street Deli. | How You Can Help | == | Join Team Kat As we head to the General Election in November, we need help spreading our winning message. I would love to have you join our team! If you would like to help our team in any way, please click == to sign up today! | | == | | | | My team and I are excited to distribute more yard signs! We also will have a number of 4' x 4' and 4' x 8' signs available upon request. If you would like a sign for your yard, please click == to reserve your sign today. A member of my team will then deliver the sign to your home. Thank you for your support! | == | | | | == | | We are working hard to execute on a winning strategy, and every dollar raised helps us toward victory in November! If you are able, please consider clicking == to make a contribution to the campaign. As always, thank you for your incredible trust and support! | Send us an mailto:info@katforcongress.com Like us on == Follow us on == Follow us on == Visit our == Sincerely, | | Kat Cammack Candidate for Congress | | | | | == | | www.KatforCongress.com | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

As our economy faces a steep road to recovery, we need someone willing to prioritize working families -- not someone happy to accept corporate PAC money and be held accountable only to DC interests.

**In this election, we need Sri Kulkarni to deliver _real_ leadership to Texas families -- not Troy Nehls.**

| Patriot,
Once again, President Trump has proved that he is only choice for President when it comes to the economy. In August of 2020, the US added 1.37 million new jobs, and the unemployment rate has dropped sharply to 8.4%.
[The Great American Comeback is underway.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015j4zZQ79cS-Zl79fGFX78YJbvPLvk9URK8poYUjRhJPW8A7GcnPgaF2lt3THELneLglcHVJCfEpS59VAipO8fqvrsPS-SY_oPjlqf3g6jmBZ8SOLF_24rqxtKxusQuj2Cti77T2yb-AoF4wujrXmp1KQaId9tD-C-k0yCbe-530=&c=FNnlVfQGMqWppxUxXg6623kbkn4iav3T3RF1dzWI__Binun9QDRMIA==&ch=Uf55mio7oWpOddlJbcRs53THvaV4wkzJRK9hywyVksizxORffN8EjQ==)
While Americans want to reopen their business and get back to work, Democrats still propose lockdowns (unless you are "peacefully protesting"). They can't be trusted to lead us through this difficult time for many people.
Democrats are the party of mobs. We are the party of jobs.

They look on as riots occur, open up hair salons illegally to get their hair cut, and prohibit citizens from worshipping and going to church. They are completely unfit to lead.

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Congratulate President Trump on the Nobel Prize nomination
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
For his great accomplishment in this step toward peace, President Trump has now been nominated for a Nobel Peace Prize! We should all congratulate President Trump for his statesmanship. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0MTM3NjUS1&kn=14&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDgxOTk0OAS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,

Peace in the Middle East may be impossible, but President Donald J. Trump just made major progress. And he’s getting recognition for it.

Thanks to President Trump, Arab countries around the region have normalized relations with our ally Israel.
http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0MTM3NjUS1&kn=7&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDgxOTk0OAS2&mt=1&rt=0
For his great accomplishment in this step toward peace, President Trump has now been nominated for a Nobel Peace Prize!

Peter, will you sign here if you agree President Trump deserves this award? http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0MTM3NjUS1&kn=5&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDgxOTk0OAS2&mt=1&rt=0

We should all congratulate President Trump for his statesmanship. He’s pursued peace through strength by obliterating ISIS and making our military the strongest in the world.

In contrast, Barack Obama got the Nobel Peace Prize just for running for office. Barack Obama’s weakness led to the rise of ISIS.

I’m sure you will agree that President Trump deserves this. Please join me in congratulating President Trump.

Sign Here http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0MTM3NjUS1&kn=1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDgxOTk0OAS2&mt=1&rt=0 In Service, http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0MTM3NjUS1&kn=6&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDgxOTk0OAS2&mt=1&rt=0 Tom Cotton http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0MTM3NjUS1&kn=3&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDgxOTk0OAS2&mt=1&rt=0

Suite 200
Little Rock, AR 72202

| Dear Friend,

This Friday, Pat will be joining Nate Loucks on 96.7FM WCOE for SOUND OFF, a community conversation radio show in LaPorte that airs Mondays and Fridays. **Please tune in and bring your questions for Pat on healthcare, education, jobs, and more.** Each live show is then podcast and put on the WCOE website.

We’re grateful to Nate for hosting Pat on WCOE 96.7FM this Friday. [**In order to defeat Jackie in November, we need people from all over the district to see and hear Pat and her message of Dignity and Justice for All.**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=40eaab1e2e&e=5886ca081d) We know this race is tightening, but Jackie still has millions of dollars in corporate special interests buying this seat. It’s time we take our seat back from outside money and put in a representative with integrity whose priority is each one of us.

We need your support to reach as many voters as possible. [**Can you contribute to our campaign today to help get Pat’s message out on TV across the district?**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=6ab3987bd6&e=5886ca081d)

name: Ellen Foster
subject: kicking it into high gear
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
These next 55 days will go by in the blink of an eye! |
---
Hey friend, did you see Jon Ossoff's message from yesterday?

I've worked on a lot of campaigns, and while no campaign is the same, one thing holds across all of them: **the post-Labor Day push!**

It's go time, friend, and we don't have a minute to lose. We're not counting down by months or weeks anymore -- **we're counting down by DAYS _(55!!!)_.**

**[Those days will go by before you know it, so we need you to chip in RIGHT NOW to ramp up this race.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2a96/5b2c1286/38e81c0e/25f0ad04/3107209048/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_08_pst_lbr?refcode=em_2020_09_09_pst_lbr_k")**

Thanks for helping us in this push,

Ellen Foster
Campaign Manager
Jon Ossoff for U.S. Senate

**\-------- Begin Forwarded Message ---------**

**From:** Jon Ossoff (iPhone)
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Date:** September 8, 2020
**Subject:** Next stop: Election Day!

Hi friend,

I hope you were able to enjoy a healthy and relaxing holiday weekend.

For this campaign, Labor Day marks a turning point -- with summer in the rearview mirror and Election Day on the horizon, this is when campaigns traditionally kick into high gear.

**_That's even more true this year, because so many people will be voting well before the sun rises on November 3._**

So I need your help TODAY. We're less than two months out, but as I've said before, with early voting beginning so soon, the Election is already here.

We have to contact every voter before they cast their ballots. _And time is getting short._

**[Friend, can you chip in ANY AMOUNT right now to help us kick this campaign into high gear?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2a96/5b2c1286/38e81c0e/25f0ad04/3107209048/VEsD/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_08_pst_lbr?refcode=em_2020_09_09_pst_lbr_k")**

She's been endorsed by **_Socialist Elizabeth Warren,_** and she is receiving support from _**Nancy Pelosi, Kathleen Sebelius, Pete Buttigieg, the anti-gun Brady PAC, and the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee.**_

name: Grayson for Georgia
subject: Some History on GA and a Revelation
body:
| | | [](http://www.graysonforga.com/?e=5855d13074ae510bef70273231986a0d&utm_source=graysonforga&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=some_history_a_revelation&n=1)
---
| Dear Friend \-- I'm going to give you some more inside information. You can do with it what you want. I got the phone call tonight. Yes, people in other places care, because GA has an opportunity to do something different.

Some history-

In 2016, I told you I had inside information that Isakson would retire before his term was up and be replaced by someone appointed by the Governor. Isakson refused to debate me, because I would have forced him to answer for his voting record. The GOP wasn't having that. Not even the Loudermilk group sponsored a debate. No one did. No one.
What happened? He RETIRED. He was replaced. FACT! **
Old News-** 1\. Trump was not happy with Kemp picking Loeffler, especially after his endorsement put Kemp over the top. FACT! **
New News-** 1\. Trump is aware that Collins was nowhere for him when he started out. Some think that because Collins played Trump up during the hearings, he's now a hero. He is not. FACT! 2\. Collins was advised to "BECOME" Pro Trump as Isakson's retirement was about to come down. 3\. Remember, Trump put Kemp over the top. He could easily put Loeffler or Collins over the top, if he wanted to and the way they are cutting each other up would cease. _**
The REVELATION is: He doesn't want to put either one over the top. FACT!**_ **
What else you need to know-** There will be no GOP sponsored debates and the Loudermilk Series may end with no shows from Collins and Loeffler, because I will bring up their records and ask them to respond to one simple question:

"If Rand Paul and Thomas Massie are 94 and 99 percent, why aren't you?"

→ GA got shortchanged with Isakson. → Republicans got shortchanged with the Tea Party. → Conservatives get shortchanged every time the GOP has had both houses going back to Bush Jr. → America got shortchanged when Gowdy, Ryan, McConnell, Graham and others didn't shutdown the hoax against Trump. → We, the People, got shortchanged when 40+ Republicans quit in 2016.

**Now is the time to send Loeffler and Collins both home.

** ******** _**
Do something different....**_ [GraysonForGA.com](https://www.graysonforga.com/r?u=kAuoj_dxuDB9aB-Vpu0gASdqKBn2OXjpzY-26pegWf9jLXJtm2UyoH1aUp_d-aLnuupFoc_pRO7NokqMkzs6GDPMRSqxRJTwTDKSuMUW8vtGWwQkDr5BvIvX2-tRs0vY7lO__-ubAjNby5TRItD9V_Lvg03oXmiWxApN0mrKI8VE8X8vdE-EYCa1LkjasTYQannClZx9n1xRBTYTmRz1J0c_eBqgymT48HuAa0leB97kjs8aT9ea73VwnpUsmrTBsEqCTJ1Y4w8Zc9j5WZboPuPbv9D4uHlHmygWzOQGaIfRNlPpXE1x0WhChDKbeJvANJ2YeVDE8Ft2_AAClC_34AGouUQAAJ_oWKM1CntQ8V-igC3fqms4rFFyY7p-n6hdyNXHSIv9FNd8EDIJqPS9AkOUPNQ6Dn-ekIE43RAuYktjxViFTt_iZz43yPsmdNoFDLVM0fLXq8z8x3rUcm76HJCTWNJ9IfAduu8d6SyDHi942VQLB16cgOhpl48z-oZEllM9VcHLsUyeoUvDDtpbo4ywts8Vcb7GulLRqimYgZ9gzinb14mvHnO8mma4wMpLWXkikHDmd-l90mkl0SvSaV-zYMXABwWgaNF6FLta78fTIsW_zPZQ7GKD3J9HJpGdqTcjVM621_4B914Sw9J6CQ&e=5855d13074ae510bef70273231986a0d&utm_source=graysonforga&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=some_history_a_revelation&n=2) Help me, help Trump, help You! clean_body: | | | | Dear Friend \-- I'm going to give you some more inside information. You can do with it what you want. I got the phone call tonight. Yes, people in other places care, because GA has an opportunity to do something different. Some history- In 2016, I told you I had inside information that Isakson would retire before his term was up and be replaced by someone appointed by the Governor. Isakson refused to debate me, because I would have forced him to answer for his voting record. The GOP wasn't having that. Not even the Loudermilk group sponsored a debate. No one did. No one. What happened? He RETIRED. He was replaced. FACT! Old News- 1\. Trump was not happy with Kemp picking Loeffler, especially after his endorsement put Kemp over the top. FACT! New News- 1\. Trump is aware that Collins was nowhere for him when he started out. Some think that because Collins played Trump up during the hearings, he's now a hero. He is not. FACT! 2\. Collins was advised to "BECOME" Pro Trump as Isakson's retirement was about to come down. 3\. Remember, Trump put Kemp over the top. He could easily put Loeffler or Collins over the top, if he wanted to and the way they are cutting each other up would cease. The REVELATION is: He doesn't want to put either one over the top. FACT! What else you need to know- There will be no GOP sponsored debates and the Loudermilk Series may end with no shows from Collins and Loeffler, because I will bring up their records and ask them to respond to one simple question: "If Rand Paul and Thomas Massie are 94 and 99 percent, why aren't you?" → GA got shortchanged with Isakson. → Republicans got shortchanged with the Tea Party. → Conservatives get shortchanged every time the GOP has had both houses going back to Bush Jr. → America got shortchanged when Gowdy, Ryan, McConnell, Graham and others didn't shutdown the hoax against Trump. → We, the People, got shortchanged when 40+ Republicans quit in 2016. Now is the time to send Loeffler and Collins both home. ****** Do something different.... Help me, help Trump, help You! Nothing but the ..... The Solutions that will Heal America. name: JoeBiden.com
subject: You're about to stop receiving emails from the Biden Campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We noticed you haven't been opening our emails recently, and in order to make sure that only our best supporters get their updates everyday, you might stop hearing from us. |
---
Hi Peter! Do you still want to stay in touch?

We noticed you haven't been opening our emails recently, and in order to make sure that only our best supporters get their updates everyday, you might stop hearing from us.

We would hate to see you go! Really, this is one of the best ways to stay in touch with you.

**So Peter, make sure you stay in touch and get alerts from JoeBiden.com! Click below to say you 're on Team Joe through the general election against Donald Trump:** | [I'M ON TEAM JOE ➞](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b298/1cd0ac28/15f1f1372/35707af2/3622564932/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/all-in-for-team-joe?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.04.20_X_reactivation_R10__F1_S1_C1__first-day-inactive&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.04.20_X_reactivation_R10__F1_S1_C1__first-day-inactive")
---
If you're going through a hard time and would like to pause emails, we understand. Click [here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b298/1cd0ac28/15f1f1372/35707af1/3622564932/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.04.20_X_reactivation_R10__F1_S1_C1__first-day-inactive&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.04.20_X_reactivation_R10__F1_S1_C1__first-day-inactive") to pause them. You can also adjust your settings by signing up to get only our most important emails [here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b298/1cd0ac28/15f1f1372/35707af0/3622564932/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.04.20_X_reactivation_R10__F1_S1_C1__first-day-inactive&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.04.20_X_reactivation_R10__F1_S1_C1__first-day-inactive"), or unsubscribe entirely if you need to by clicking [here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b298/1cd0ac28/15f1f1372/35707aef/3622564932/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.04.20_X_reactivation_R10__F1_S1_C1__first-day-inactive&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.04.20_X_reactivation_R10__F1_S1_C1__first-day-inactive").

We hope you'll stick around, Peter! Joe Biden is our presumptive Democratic nominee and we need to make sure this team is as strong as possible so we can defeat Donald Trump in November.

Thanks for being on the team!

[JoeBiden.com](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b298/1cd0ac28/15f1f1372/35707af2/3622564932/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/all-in-for-team-joe?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.04.20_X_reactivation_R10__F1_S1_C1__first-day-inactive&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.04.20_X_reactivation_R10__F1_S1_C1__first-day-inactive")
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b298/1cd0ac28/15f1f1372/35707aee/3622564932/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b298/1cd0ac28/15f1f1372/35707aed/3622564932/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b298/1cd0ac28/15f1f1372/35707aec/3622564932/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b298/1cd0ac28/15f1f1372/35707aeb/3622564932/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b298/1cd0ac28/15f1f1372/35707aea/3622564932/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b298/1cd0ac28/15f1f1372/35707ae9/3622564932/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b298/1cd0ac28/15f1f1372/35707ae8/3622564932/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b298/1cd0ac28/15f1f1372/35707ae7/3622564932/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b298/1cd0ac28/15f1f1372/35707ae6/3622564932/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b298/1cd0ac28/15f1f1372/35707ae5/3622564932/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b298/1cd0ac28/15f1f1372/35707ae8/3622564932/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b298/1cd0ac28/15f1f1372/35707ae4/3622564932/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b298/1cd0ac28/15f1f1372/35707ae7/3622564932/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b298/1cd0ac28/15f1f1372/35707ae3/3622564932/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

Friend,

For MONTHS, the Fake News polls have shown Sleepy Joe ahead of your President in key battleground states.

The lying media doesn’t want to upset their Democrat Partners, so in a recent poll, they’re still reporting I’m down a few points. Ridiculous. They’re trying to TRICK the American People into thinking I have no chance of winning, but WE know that couldn’t be further from the truth.

It’s going to be an uphill battle to win these critical states, and I am counting on YOU to step up and help ensure a MASSIVE VICTORY. I need you to contribute to the Official Battleground State Fund.

ALL GIFTS MADE TO THE OFFICIAL BATTLEGROUND STATE FUND WILL BE 600%-MATCHED!

name: Sandy Smith
subject: Help me Beat Pelosi's Deputy - GK Butterfield
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hEeZE18Fs3Nxmng&b=JNjygHxH1DiRQlI3t.zvrg)
---

Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. I am a business owner and I think it's long past time to open the economy!**

Anyone with an ounce of common sense can see that, if murderous Antifa rioters can gather night after night, then reasonable people can gather and conduct commerce. Shops can open, people can work, students can go to school, and life can go on!
The Democrats can't let life go on. If life goes on, they lose their crazy tyrannical Covid lockdowns.
You know the worst part of those anti-liberty lockdowns? The Democrats only want the common people to be under them, but they don't want to be subject to the restrictions themselves!
_**In Chicago, the nutty Mayor Lightfoot got her hair done at a salon while shutting down salons to ordinary people.**_
_Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot, a Democrat, defended a haircut she received recently despite salons and barbershops shutting down under the state’s stay-at-home order.
Lightfoot was criticized for her actions after previously stating in one of her public service announcements that “ _getting your roots done is not essential_ ,” according to the Chicago Tribune.
The controversy began when the stylist posted photos with the mayor on Facebook last weekend, thanking her for her hard work and saying she had the “pleasure of giving Mayor Lightfoot a hair trim.”
The stylist was wearing a mask and gloves, the mayor said in defense of her haircut during a press conference earlier this week. “I’m the public face of this city. _I’m on national media and I’m out in the public eye._ ”_

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hEeZE18Fs3Nxmng&b=JNjygHxH1DiRQlI3t.zvrg)
---

_Now, Nancy Pelosi has done the same thing- after criticizing President Trump for not being tough on Covid, Pelosi demanded a hair salon open FOR HER ONLY:_

_House Speaker Nancy Pelosi visited a San Francisco hair salon on Monday afternoon for a wash and blow-out, despite local ordinances keeping salons closed amid the coronavirus pandemic, Fox News has learned.

In security footage obtained by Fox News, and timestamped Monday at 3:08 p.m. Pacific Time, _the California powerhouse is seen walking through ESalonSF in San Francisco with wet hair, and without a mask over her mouth or nose._

The stylist doing her hair can be seen following her wearing a black face mask.

Salons in San Francisco had been closed since March and were only notified they could reopen on Sept. 1 for outdoor hairstyling services only._

**_When confronted with the obvious hypocrisy of her actions, you know what Pelosi did? She had the nerve to blame the salon owner!_**

_Nancy Pelosi is speaking out, demanding an apology from the hair salon in San Francisco.

Pelosi got her hair done Monday before hair salons were allowed to operate in the Bay Area.

That salon is owned by a Fresno native Erica Kious. Kious also provides hair services near Palm and Nees Avenues.

The general manager of Sola Salon Studios says she’s a good person who got caught in the crossfire, but Pelosi throwing Kious’ salon in the San Francisco under the bus.

“ _This salon owes me an apology for setting up, we trusted a neighbor salon that I’ve been to for years,_ ” Pelosi said.

The salon controversy continues after a video surfaced of the Speaker of The House, was seen getting her hair done in San Francisco on Monday._

_Those of us around in the 1990s may remember DC Mayor Marion Barry, when caught smoking crack with a prostitute, claiming "B*tch set me up!"._

This is about as bad as that. But this is what Democrats do, isn't it? After all, Barry was re-elected twice more AFTER being caught!

**Pelosi's Democrats don't care about you or your health. They just want to control you with rules that they themselves don't obey!**

[If you agree with me, I need your help to beat Pelosi's deputy whip Butterfield!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hEeZE18Fs3Nxmng&b=JNjygHxH1DiRQlI3t.zvrg) Unlike Pelosi and Butterfield, I know what everyday Americans go through. I'll re-open the economy!

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hEeZE18Fs3Nxmng&b=JNjygHxH1DiRQlI3t.zvrg), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda.

G.K. Butterfield is awful, but to replace him I [really need you today](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hEeZE18Fs3Nxmng&b=JNjygHxH1DiRQlI3t.zvrg)! Let's stand up to these hypocrites now, before it's too late!

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hEeZE18Fs3Nxmng&b=JNjygHxH1DiRQlI3t.zvrg)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hEeZE18Fs3Nxmng&b=JNjygHxH1DiRQlI3t.zvrg)
---
P.S. [Will you contribute $15, $60, $250, or your largest contribution?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hEeZE18Fs3Nxmng&b=JNjygHxH1DiRQlI3t.zvrg) I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield.

PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC

P.O. Box 434
Winterville NC 28590
USA

[Unsubscribe](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCzsLOxsLJys) | [Change Subscriber Options](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCzsLOxsLJys)

name: Bill Olson
subject: I Stand with Law Enforcement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iT1gKdIpzF6OuRU&b=17KPeA1OqVT9Oxx9aLraug

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just overwhelmingly won my primary, by 20 points! I live in Central Florida, not far from Orlando. We are a law and order suburban community, a swing district! I will stand shoulder to shoulder with President Trump as we fight far-Left extremist Socialism!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iT1gKdIpzF6OuRU&b=17KPeA1OqVT9Oxx9aLraug

The Biden Riots may have roots in hole-in-the-ground communities like Portland or Seattle, but we here in Central Florida don't take well to that stuff here!

What happened in Kenosha, Wisconsin is the best example of why we NEED the Second Amendment, and why we must fight this year to protect it.

The story of Kyle Rittenhouse, a young man who works in Kenosha, breaks my heart. He was being violently attacked and he used the Second Amendment to defend himself.

The liberals defended the murderous rioters and villified this kid. They attacked him because he did not allow a crazed, violent mob to kill him.

The riots started in my district too. But law enforcement here was having none of it, and we put these idiots down!

Check out the words of Polk County Sheriff Judd, in referring to the unrest in my district:

“The reason [for Monday’s continued curfew] is clear – we’ve had criminal conduct afoot," Sheriff Judd said. "We’ve had citizens injured, windows broken, and we’ve had other attempts at assaulting law enforcement officers and assaulting buildings that we repelled. And there are curfews in other communities, and we certainly don’t want to create a vacuum for people to come here when there’s a curfew in another area.”

He went on to say that if you needed to be out during the curfew because of work or another emergency, the "curfew's not for you." Instead, "it's for the lawless people that would wreak havoc in the community."

Sheriff Judd also had a stern message for anyone who might come to the county to riot, loot, or injure people.

"I would tell them if you value your life, you probably shouldn’t do that in Polk County, because the people of Polk County like guns, they have guns, and I encourage them to own guns, and they’re going to be in their homes tonight with their guns loaded. And if you try to break into their homes, to steal, to set fires, I’m highly recommending they blow you back out of their house with their guns. So leave the community alone, and we’ll do our best to support the community."

Sheriff Judd speaks for all of us. If you come to Central Florida to destroy our communities and kill our people, we will not treat you with kid gloves like Seattle or Portland's weak mayors. We will use our Second Amendment rights, just like Kyle Rittenhouse did!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iT1gKdIpzF6OuRU&b=17KPeA1OqVT9Oxx9aLraug

The extremist Dems and the Fake News will call us all kind of names. If they were willing to destroy the lives of two minor children- Kyle Rittenhouse and Nick Sandmann- they will certainly try to smear us.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iT1gKdIpzF6OuRU&b=17KPeA1OqVT9Oxx9aLraug

The extreme Left actively hates us. If they gain power this year, kiss good bye to your gun rights! They hate our Second Amendment and they want to slime this kid because of it.

Here's the good news: The American people see this. They are rallying behind our American President!

It's the extremists or us. That's why we MUST win this year!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iT1gKdIpzF6OuRU&b=17KPeA1OqVT9Oxx9aLraug

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iT1gKdIpzF6OuRU&b=17KPeA1OqVT9Oxx9aLraug

I won't be afraid to fight. I'll fight the extremists and I'll fight for our liberties.

Last week, Nancy Pelosi called us Republicans "enemies of the state". She wants the rioters to attack us and harm our families. The Democrats may enjoy playing games with our families and their safety, but I don't!

clean_body: Bill Olson for Congress Hi Peter, My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just overwhelmingly won my primary, by 20 points! I live in Central Florida, not far from Orlando. We are a law and order suburban community, a swing district! I will stand shoulder to shoulder with President Trump as we fight far-Left extremist Socialism! The Biden Riots may have roots in hole-in-the-ground communities like Portland or Seattle, but we here in Central Florida don't take well to that stuff here! What happened in Kenosha, Wisconsin is the best example of why we NEED the Second Amendment, and why we must fight this year to protect it. The story of Kyle Rittenhouse, a young man who works in Kenosha, breaks my heart. He was being violently attacked and he used the Second Amendment to defend himself. The liberals defended the murderous rioters and villified this kid. They attacked him because he did not allow a crazed, violent mob to kill him. The riots started in my district too. But law enforcement here was having none of it, and we put these idiots down! Check out the words of Polk County Sheriff Judd, in referring to the unrest in my district: “The reason [for Monday’s continued curfew] is clear – we’ve had criminal conduct afoot," Sheriff Judd said. "We’ve had citizens injured, windows broken, and we’ve had other attempts at assaulting law enforcement officers and assaulting buildings that we repelled. And there are curfews in other communities, and we certainly don’t want to create a vacuum for people to come here when there’s a curfew in another area.” He went on to say that if you needed to be out during the curfew because of work or another emergency, the "curfew's not for you." Instead, "it's for the lawless people that would wreak havoc in the community." Sheriff Judd also had a stern message for anyone who might come to the county to riot, loot, or injure people. "I would tell them if you value your life, you probably shouldn’t do that in Polk County, because the people of Polk County like guns, they have guns, and I encourage them to own guns, and they’re going to be in their homes tonight with their guns loaded. And if you try to break into their homes, to steal, to set fires, I’m highly recommending they blow you back out of their house with their guns. So leave the community alone, and we’ll do our best to support the community." Sheriff Judd speaks for all of us. If you come to Central Florida to destroy our communities and kill our people, we will not treat you with kid gloves like Seattle or Portland's weak mayors. We will use our Second Amendment rights, just like Kyle Rittenhouse did! Image The extremist Dems and the Fake News will call us all kind of names. If they were willing to destroy the lives of two minor children- Kyle Rittenhouse and Nick Sandmann- they will certainly try to smear us. Image The extreme Left actively hates us. If they gain power this year, kiss good bye to your gun rights! They hate our Second Amendment and they want to slime this kid because of it. Here's the good news: The American people see this. They are rallying behind our American President! It's the extremists or us. That's why we MUST win this year! Image I won't be afraid to fight. I'll fight the extremists and I'll fight for our liberties. Last week, Nancy Pelosi called us Republicans "enemies of the state". She wants the rioters to attack us and harm our families. The Democrats may enjoy playing games with our families and their safety, but I don't! But I have taken an oath to the Constitution- one that has no expiration date! I am a patriot and I need your help to counter the media's lies! Are YOU a loyal American? Help me replace Socialist Darren Soto, and stand up for our freedoms as Americans! I am now the official Republican nominee, and I need your help to win in November! If I win, Nancy Pelosi will almost certainly not be speaker. Help me now! I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST Antifa! Can you help me? This is a swing suburban district and we can take it back! Can I count on you for a donation today? Time is running out- that's why I need your help today! I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help! Let's get this done! Image Bill Olson Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars Supports President Trump Not a Career Politician Hard Core Conservative Fighter Image P.S. I really need your help today , so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill. PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. body:
Last night Powered by People volunteers made more than 320,000 phone calls
to Texas voters.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42547?source=ema20200909-104534&t=1001&akid=104534%2E444211%2E63PKgv ][IMG]

I was right there with the hundreds of volunteers who turned out to call
Texans from across the state, listening to the people who will decide the
outcome of the most important election of our lives. Voters who indicated
a preference for Democratic candidates were marked so that they can be
contacted again ahead of Early Voting (which begins on October 13th).
Those who said they’re going to vote for Trump and Republican candidates
were marked so that we don’t contact them again. Same for wrong numbers.

About those wrong numbers. We get our fair share of them. We are calling
largely unproven lists of voters, so that’s part of the deal. But if we
didn’t call these numbers now, it would be left to our candidates to call
through them in the remaining weeks before Early Voting, which would be a
waste of their most precious, limited resource: their time.

So we do this work, calling through millions of Texas phone numbers to
find those registered voters that we need to turn out in October and
November. This effort — the thousands of volunteers, the millions of phone
calls — at the end of the day will produce a verified, actionable list of
known voters who are likely to vote for our candidates. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42547?source=ema20200909-104534&t=1002&akid=104534%2E444211%2E63PKgv ]Help us produce
that list of voters to help out campaigns across Texas by signing up for a
phone bank today!

Having those names and phone numbers and turning them out is key to
winning their elections. And when our candidates win, we gain control of
the Texas House for the first time in 20 years; we pick up more
Congressional seats; we win the U.S. Senate; and we make Joe Biden the
first Democrat in 44 years to win Texas’ electoral college votes.

There’s no amount of money, no magic message, no cavalry riding in at the
end of the day that will win these elections. It’s the hard work of
reaching Texas voters, one call at a time. Exactly what Powered by People
volunteers do on these phone banks.

We need you with us right now. This week we are calling into four Texas
House districts with the candidates themselves. You’ll have a chance to
meet them, hear from them, and then call their voters to make sure they
win these important elections.

I’ll be there with you, making calls through the evening, joining you in
the important volunteer work that has become the antidote to despair and
the key to victory.

Join us and sign up to make these vital calls:
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43037?source=ema20200909-104534&t=1003&akid=104534%2E444211%2E63PKgv ]Virtual Phone Bank with State House candidates and Beto
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43037?source=ema20200909-104534&t=1004&akid=104534%2E444211%2E63PKgv ]Thursday, September 10, 6:30 pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43037?source=ema20200909-104534&t=1005&akid=104534%2E444211%2E63PKgv ]Get more info or RSVP »

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43038?source=ema20200909-104534&t=1006&akid=104534%2E444211%2E63PKgv ]Virtual Phone Bank with State House candidates and Beto
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43038?source=ema20200909-104534&t=1007&akid=104534%2E444211%2E63PKgv ]Monday, September 14, 6:30 pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43038?source=ema20200909-104534&t=1008&akid=104534%2E444211%2E63PKgv ]Get more info or RSVP »

See you soon,

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1009&akid=104534%2E444211%2E63PKgv

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.

name: Jamal Raad, Evergreen Action
subject: TAKE ACTION: Add your name to eliminate the filibuster
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
We need to talk about the filibuster.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=2810%2E53494%2EXoxRe9) Friend, we need to talk about the filibuster. The filibuster is an archaic, undemocratic Senate "rule" that's nowhere to be found in the Constitution. It means that in order for any bill to get a vote in the Senate, at least 60 senators have to agree to it. In other words, it only takes 41 senators to kill a bill. As we've seen this summer, leaders in both the House and Senate are proposing bold new plans that finally meet the scope of the climate crisis. But these plans are moot with Mitch McConnell standing in the way, ready to block anything that could mean progress. In order to turn those plans into laws, we need to first eliminate the filibuster. **[Add your name to show your support for ending the archaic and undemocratic filibuster today.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/850?t=3&akid=2810%2E53494%2EXoxRe9)** | [END THE FILIBUSTER ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/850?t=4&akid=2810%2E53494%2EXoxRe9)
---
The filibuster means that Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans -- who collectively receive millions of dollars in contributions from the fossil fuel industry -- essentially have veto power over any climate legislation (and any other progressive legislation you might care about). We've seen before how this unfolds: In 2009, the House passed the American Clean Energy and Security Act -- which would have created a cap-and-trade system to curb carbon emissions -- but it never got a vote in the Senate, _even though Democrats had a large majority._
So Senate Republicans (and the big polluters that bankroll them) can block any legislation they want -- no matter whether they're in the majority or minority. As it stands, the fossil fuel filibuster wins the day.
Unless.
We call it like it is: The Senate is broken. The climate is in ever-increasing crisis. And to fix one (the climate crisis), we need to fix the other (the Senate).
**[It's time to make serious headway toward defeating the climate crisis. Sign our petition today to support ending the filibuster in order to pass bold climate legislation.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/850?t=5&akid=2810%2E53494%2EXoxRe9)**
The leaders we elect this November will be tasked with solving three crises at once: the climate crisis, the racial justice crisis, and the COVID-19 crisis. Eliminating the filibuster is a necessary step toward solving these problems and more.
Thanks,
Jamal Raad
Co-Founder and Campaign Director, Evergreen Action
[END THE FILIBUSTER ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/850?t=6&akid=2810%2E53494%2EXoxRe9)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=2810%2E53494%2EXoxRe9). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

name: Senator Pat Toomey
subject: Will you help my friend Lisa?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
I’ve been impressed to see a leader like Lisa Scheller step up to the plate in PA-07 to help flip the district back to a direction of commonsense. Lis Peter, I’ve been impressed to see a leader like Lisa Scheller step up to the plate in PA-07 to help flip the district back to a direction of commonsense. Lisa embodies conservative values and is fighting to make sure that voters and constituents in the Lehigh Valley have a voice in Washington. As I look forward toward November, I’m shocked that we have fewer than 60 DAYS to Election Day. We are truly in the final sprint of this race, and Peter, this is the exact reason I’m emailing today. Lisa is facing attacks from not just her opponent, but from Dark Money groups that are targeting this congressional district. name: BREAKING - via Jon Ossoff HQ
subject: Trump knew. And so did Perdue.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
And they did nothing. |
---
**_"I wanted to always play it down" - Donald Trump_**
Friend, Donald Trump knew.

According to audio interviews for Bob Woodward's new book, **Trump knew just how lethal the coronavirus was all the way back in January._"This is deadly stuff,"_ the President told Woodward.**

**But President Trump and Congressional Republicans like David Perdue did nothing. They downplayed the danger of COVID-19,_all the while knowing full well the extent of its threat_ , and now 190,000 Americans have died on their watch.**

**_And friend, Jon Ossoff's opponent, Sen. David Perdue, echoed Trump's dismissal of the coronavirus every step of the way._**

Perdue, taking Trump's lead, said in March, "the risk of this virus in the United States right now still remains low."

_Friend, we'll be blunt: This is abhorrent._

subject: President Trump wants to protect the environment. The left wants to punish America.
body:
President Trump visited Florida yesterday, where he signed a presidential order to extend the moratorium on offshore drilling for Florida’s... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=09abdc0c74&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • September 9, 2020
---
| | |
# **President Trump wants to protect the environment. The left wants to punish America.**

**President Trump visited Florida** yesterday, where he signed a presidential order to extend the moratorium on offshore drilling for Florida’s Gulf Coast. He also expanded the moratorium to include the Atlantic coasts of Florida, Georgia, and South Carolina.

**“Thanks to my administration’s** pro-American energy policies, we can take this step and the next step while remaining the number-one producer of oil and natural gas anywhere in the world,” the President said in Jupiter, Florida.

🎬 [**President Trump: We can protect our environment AND create jobs!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ba2d2f0e0e&e=3ee4985eea)

**“With fracking** , the shale revolution, and the tremendous surge in American energy production, we’re showing that we can create jobs, safeguard the environment, and keep energy prices low for America and low for our citizens.”

**While America** has become the world’s top producer of oil and natural gas, our country has also successfully cut greenhouse gas emissions and improved air quality.

**“The left’s agenda** isn’t about protecting the environment—it’s about punishing America,” President Trump said. “Instead of focusing on radical ideology, my administration is focused on delivering real results.”

**Here are just a few** of those results when it comes to the environment:
* **President Trump recently signed** the Great American Outdoors Act, securing the single largest investment in our National Parks in history.

* **He ended NAFTA** and replaced it with the USMCA, which has the strongest environmental protections of any trade agreement in history.

* **He signed the Save Our Seas Act** to protect our environment from foreign nations that litter our oceans with garbage.

* **He signed the largest public lands** legislation in a decade, designating 1.3 million new acres of wilderness last year.

* **His Administration has invested** over $38 billion in clean water infrastructure and delivered upgrades for numerous projects, including Everglades restoration to preserve ecosystems and protect millions of Floridians from flooding.

**“We’ll preserve this glorious land** for our children, for our grandchildren, and for every generation of American to come,” President Trump said.

📖 [**President Trump Is Committed to Conserving America’s Environment!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a8a5a50f95&e=3ee4985eea)

🎬 [**WATCH: The last administration pursued a globalist agenda**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d623f3e752&e=3ee4985eea)

---

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Fletcher's Support of Public Option Hurts Houston
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
# **Fletcher's Public Option Will Hurt Houston Healthcare**
Although Congresswoman Lizzie Fletcher claims to be a moderate who will work with both sides, her record of supporting Nancy Pelosi over 99% of the time tells the real story of her time in Congress. Fletcher supports a slew of liberal policies that would cost Houston families tremendously. Nothing is more representative of Fletcher's dangerous polices than her support for expanding government-run healthcare.
Contrary to the interests and priorities of her constituents, Representative Lizzie Fletcher has been a vocal supporter of implementing a public option in our healthcare system, a concept so liberal that Democrats cut it from Obamacare proposals in 2010. This is disappointing but unsurprising coming from a politician who claims to be a moderate but takes every opportunity to push her platform to the left.

The consequences of a public option would be devastating to the healthcare industry. The bottom line is this: Fletcher's proposed public option would drive up healthcare costs, drive down quality of care, and bring long-term instability to our healthcare system.
* Under a public option, over 100,000 Americans would lose their existing coverage, private insurance would be pushed to the brink of destruction, and employer-sponsored insurance would be all but eliminated
* A public option could cost up to $1.5 trillion in tax dollars
* Adding a public option would undermine Medicare recipients and threaten the care of millions of seniors

Fletcher's support of a public option is incongruous with the needs of her constituents: voters who want to increase access to healthcare without undermining the quality of care available to American families. The public option, like many Democrat proposals, hinges on the false premise that more government intervention is better. The people of Houston know and understand that heavy-handed governance often hurts working families the most, and the public option is no exception.

As the next Congressman for the 7th District, Wesley Hunt will collaborate with medical professionals and patients to bring sustainable, affordable improvements to our healthcare apparatus.

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=92775f662eb74040b17678ef2c0dfea0&_e=KER0nKIPuEsAYzVR_60ev38D699HEYtOxvUbRieRFNXa4hqDLIHE2Gvxk8QBOPy2Igm5LKjXJSeGw2N8Gv8cDuf1JTlyA193qWY72Kb_RT9X8xYijuaIVqcKazaZe5D-Z570Rgw5RtMIwvDKFy_VuRj7bWL6bGR0lRbQfmj3_HB3pzQmAAMjemUI7bdv3K8MyNjCNJcAKfqGpuxP6ag8Er1hJZCaGZCrvOCKi-wSj8HNBeAL3d5t4HFnFbAmRM62rMyVDpgMadB6M1VWNy4Sl-F0HRr1yRxtbM1uvOkc7iM%3D)****

subject: the GOP is determined to win VA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|

| |
| [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85daf4/53d9897e/55fc67a2/1c8806e2/4015463783/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc2NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-gopoffices?refcode=20200909_f_1_nd__766__&refcode2=graphic1&amount=5")
---
Derek --

We'll be frank: the Trump campaign and the GOP are making inroads in the Commonwealth.

The Trump campaign is continuing to open offices and pour money into Virginia to re-elect Donald Trump and elect Republicans down the ballot -- including Mark's challenger, who promises to be a rubber stamp for the Trump agenda.

**[If you're able, will you make a contribution to help re-elect Mark Warner and keep Virginia blue in 2020?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85daf4/53d9897e/55fc67a2/1c8806e1/4015463783/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc2NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-gopoffices?refcode=20200909_f_1_nd__766__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

More than 56% of campaign contributions in Virginia during this election cycle have gone to Republicans. **If we 're going to make a change in November by electing Joe Biden and taking back the Senate, we need to make up ground.**

**The GOP thinks that Virginia is a "battleground state" -- and they're determined to win in November.** We know better than to underestimate them. Our team remembers that Mark Warner narrowly won re-election by less than 1% in 2014, and we're not taking anything for granted in this campaign.

The election is only **55 days away.** We need your help to catch up to the Trump campaign and make sure that we re-elect Mark Warner and elect Democrats up and down the ticket. **[Can you pitch in?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85daf4/53d9897e/55fc67a2/1c8806e0/4015463783/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc2NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-gopoffices?refcode=20200909_f_1_nd__766__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Thank you for your support.

-- Team Warner

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: One Indiana - best Hoosier tenderloins
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Indiana is a land of proud food traditions — we’re home to legendary steakhouses, amazing breweries, classic diners, and much, much more. [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=5a3274f5f2bf4fb892964603d73a1c4c&_e=FeS9ju2sCvGN_4U3l3_jGWtY-6wEJB3emZ8c-Ok0cF53v2qly5I4nwKXJPy0VwxntlUJQw92SnQfuQ2dV_NxzkOIeSce5Vhn4mNtJlmVBx39bfv5Kd4F7EPQfWdPfNoUyou6Q9k2Nh10q2pGrdwYhmgD9-oDGgUMC5tUPPR2BqwBmg6vNInlY8iCMx1Vn1V_Tn-9gXHsZZ1d6YvT1vYR2Y3pWU5zlhSqNJJIMBtxtF3pth8JngJoL6CnIbb-jIQeaWWuA4ByCzFGklGX2a8IXQBLLiwRc45k8Z7jFuJdSKiv0G_8NaZHg0nZCKxQberhya08Ywa8VypgkOQCrVH4PxJMyeu9GTPn4wmreZlrisoIxmDjhFSVPrOPrsOy-f70f_jrT9-Rg0_vOrD2L_-1_bU402gNKM9LrbFrNSRZJ2I5HlWHtLx5fxKPp1yusxUdIB2qO9m0fcpCOLD0iBnUBBXAD2UdsuRUhiTXMGbP69iK0O-MdgeM4cPcMDCvC-SB) Friend,

Indiana is a land of proud food traditions — we’re home to legendary steakhouses, amazing breweries, classic diners, and much, much more.
But here at the Holcomb Crew, there’s one Hoosier food tradition that stands above the rest.
_**The Indiana pork tenderloin. **_
You know, the delicious, fried sandwich that’s frequently the size of your head (with a normal sized bun, of course). In fact, there’s probably no Hoosier who loves a good breaded pork tenderloin more than Governor Holcomb. He’s got this list of his favorite places to enjoy this classic Hoosier meal — and as we’re getting back out safely to our favorite restaurants again, he wanted us to share it with you.
It’s a long list (**like we said, he really loves pork tenderloins**), so get ready for this mouth-watering tour across our state. [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=5a3274f5f2bf4fb892964603d73a1c4c&_e=FeS9ju2sCvGN_4U3l3_jGWtY-6wEJB3emZ8c-Ok0cF53v2qly5I4nwKXJPy0VwxntlUJQw92SnQfuQ2dV_NxzkOIeSce5Vhn4mNtJlmVBx39bfv5Kd4F7EPQfWdPfNoUyou6Q9k2Nh10q2pGrdwYhmgD9-oDGgUMC5tUPPR2BqwBmg6vNInlY8iCMx1Vn1V_Tn-9gXHsZZ1d6YvT1vYR2Y3pWU5zlhSqNJJIMBtxtF3pth8JngJoL6CnIbb-jIQeaWWuA4ByCzFGklGX2a8IXQBLLiwRc45k8Z7jFuJdSKjhcdheNqDRMDbRnEh-xHZ_EaXkP7NVlWIOfHnkzus16RMGtiUfVv2vyrP5oF33YBqNr5g6pIj77kvKuYBW3RLS77e71u3uEF7bVuWRfqdITfiXJe49bUkCR8UoB79bLVC_HTvfXm6SC18gcSAgypOk-fVTYRrKPVIemnoo17r21G_AQXabODacFThK_9zCGRDeVyFvasdxOFa4Rl6j2sBq)
* **Edwards Drive In, Indianapolis** \- Originally opened as a Dog’n Suds drive-in, Edwards has been serving their famous tenderloin since August 10, 1957. It’s a true Hoosier tradition and an absolute must-try — don’t forget to order a side of their hand-dipped onion rings!
* **Mr. Dave’s, North Manchester** \- Mr. Dave’s has been a North Manchester institution since 1962. From a tenderloin to broasted chicken, you won’t leave hungry.
* **Nick’s English Hut, Bloomington** \- What a great American story. Founded by Nick Hrisomalos, a Greek immigrant and entrepreneur with only a third-grade education, IU students have been stopping by to get their tenderloin since 1927!
* **Nick’s Kitchen, Huntington** \- This classic joint has been around since 1908, with a claim to fame as the home of the original pork tenderloin. But they’ve also got some fantastic homemade pies and hand-dipped shakes.
* **Ray’s Drive In, Kokomo** \- They claim to be home to Indiana’s largest tenderloin!
* **The Friendly Tavern, Zionsville** \- It’s all in the name — their tagline is “You are a stranger here but once." They serve up world-class hospitality alongside their world-class Hoosier tenderloins.
* **The Aristocrat, Broad Ripple** \- The first restaurant to ever offer patio seating in Indy, you can wash down one of their amazing tenderloins with one of the 60 delicious draft beers they have on tap!
* **The Overlook Restaurant, Leavenworth** \- The only thing better than the view at the Overlook? The food, of course. Enjoy a tenderloin when overlooking the gorgeous Ohio River.
* **Triple XXX Family Restaurant, West Lafayette** \- Famous for their root beer — the perfect drink to wash down your tenderloin!
* **Slippery Noodle Inn, Indianapolis** \- The Yeagy family has been serving up delicious food and drinks for 50 years at Indiana’s oldest bar (it was originally founded in 1850!). Stop by for some live music (socially distanced, of course), and try out their jumbo tenderloin.
* **Loughmillers, Indianapolis** \- Come for the great historic theme and location (just across the street from the Statehouse!), stay for the great food.
* **Mug N’ Bun Drive In, Indianapolis** \- The Mug N’ Bun had social distancing down before it was cool. This Indy West Side drive-in is a great place to grab some root beer and enjoy a tenderloin from your car!
* **Workingman’s Friend, Indianapolis** \- Another great Indy joint, there’s no better place to chow down after a hard day’s work.
* **Storie’s, Greensburg** \- Serving homemade Indiana delicacies since 1977, Storie’s is a small-town gem.
* **Crossroads Family Restaurant, Versailles** \- They really do treat every customer like they are a part of their family. Come on down to Versailles and get a classic hand-tenderized pork tenderloin.

That’s our list for this week — did we miss the best pork tenderloin in Indiana? Let us know your favorite place to get one below! clean_body: Indiana is a land of proud food traditions — we’re home to legendary steakhouses, amazing breweries, classic diners, and much, much more. Friend, Indiana is a land of proud food traditions — we’re home to legendary steakhouses, amazing breweries, classic diners, and much, much more. But here at the Holcomb Crew, there’s one Hoosier food tradition that stands above the rest. The Indiana pork tenderloin. You know, the delicious, fried sandwich that’s frequently the size of your head (with a normal sized bun, of course). In fact, there’s probably no Hoosier who loves a good breaded pork tenderloin more than Governor Holcomb. He’s got this list of his favorite places to enjoy this classic Hoosier meal — and as we’re getting back out safely to our favorite restaurants again, he wanted us to share it with you. It’s a long list (like we said, he really loves pork tenderloins), so get ready for this mouth-watering tour across our state. Edwards Drive In, Indianapolis \- Originally opened as a Dog’n Suds drive-in, Edwards has been serving their famous tenderloin since August 10, 1957. It’s a true Hoosier tradition and an absolute must-try — don’t forget to order a side of their hand-dipped onion rings! Mr. Dave’s, North Manchester \- Mr. Dave’s has been a North Manchester institution since 1962. From a tenderloin to broasted chicken, you won’t leave hungry. Nick’s English Hut, Bloomington \- What a great American story. Founded by Nick Hrisomalos, a Greek immigrant and entrepreneur with only a third-grade education, IU students have been stopping by to get their tenderloin since 1927! Nick’s Kitchen, Huntington \- This classic joint has been around since 1908, with a claim to fame as the home of the original pork tenderloin. But they’ve also got some fantastic homemade pies and hand-dipped shakes. Ray’s Drive In, Kokomo \- They claim to be home to Indiana’s largest tenderloin! The Friendly Tavern, Zionsville \- It’s all in the name — their tagline is “You are a stranger here but once." They serve up world-class hospitality alongside their world-class Hoosier tenderloins. The Aristocrat, Broad Ripple \- The first restaurant to ever offer patio seating in Indy, you can wash down one of their amazing tenderloins with one of the 60 delicious draft beers they have on tap! The Overlook Restaurant, Leavenworth \- The only thing better than the view at the Overlook? The food, of course. Enjoy a tenderloin when overlooking the gorgeous Ohio River. Triple XXX Family Restaurant, West Lafayette \- Famous for their root beer — the perfect drink to wash down your tenderloin! Slippery Noodle Inn, Indianapolis \- The Yeagy family has been serving up delicious food and drinks for 50 years at Indiana’s oldest bar (it was originally founded in 1850!). Stop by for some live music (socially distanced, of course), and try out their jumbo tenderloin. Loughmillers, Indianapolis \- Come for the great historic theme and location (just across the street from the Statehouse!), stay for the great food. Mug N’ Bun Drive In, Indianapolis \- The Mug N’ Bun had social distancing down before it was cool. This Indy West Side drive-in is a great place to grab some root beer and enjoy a tenderloin from your car! Workingman’s Friend, Indianapolis \- Another great Indy joint, there’s no better place to chow down after a hard day’s work. Storie’s, Greensburg \- Serving homemade Indiana delicacies since 1977, Storie’s is a small-town gem. Crossroads Family Restaurant, Versailles** \- They really do treat every customer like they are a part of their family. Come on down to Versailles and get a classic hand-tenderized pork tenderloin. That’s our list for this week — did we miss the best pork tenderloin in Indiana? Let us know your favorite place to get one below! Thanks for reading, Holcomb Crew | | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. All rights reserved. | | Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN 46204 | (317) 569-0709 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Tom Cotton
subject: I am honored to be considered for the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
I will answer the call to service if needed and I will honor the Constitution. It’s time to overturn Roe vs. Wade. It’s time to protect the Second Amendment. And it’s time to protect your right to worship. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0MTY5NzMS1&kn=6&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDgzMjQ4MwS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,

I am honored that President Donald J. Trump has added my name to his shortlist of potential Supreme Court nominees.

President Trump has demonstrated a clear commitment to defending our Constitution and honoring its intent as written by our Founding Fathers. Interpreting the Constitution and the rights it guarantees is a very serious obligation.

I will answer the call to service if needed and I will honor the Constitution.

It’s time to overturn Roe vs. Wade. It’s time to protect the Second Amendment. And it’s time to protect your right to worship.

Unfortunately, the far Left is attacking President Trump and me for our commitment to the Constitution.

Immediately after President Trump’s announcement, the far Left’s disgusting attacks began. They’re out to stop me because they fear Supreme Court justices who will interpret the Constitution as it was written.

Peter, will you stand with me against the far Left’s attacks? http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0MTY5NzMS1&kn=10&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDgzMjQ4MwS2&mt=1&rt=0

The far Left shares a very different vision for our country, and they want to shred our constitution and the very values it represents.

The far Left knows that with me on the Supreme Court, they can say goodbye to Roe v. Wade.

Will you stand with me? http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0MTY5NzMS1&kn=12&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDgzMjQ4MwS2&mt=1&rt=0 In Service, http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0MTY5NzMS1&kn=13&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDgzMjQ4MwS2&mt=1&rt=0 Tom Cotton http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0MTY5NzMS1&kn=5&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDgzMjQ4MwS2&mt=1&rt=0

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Two new essential CRUSH COVID features
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend, Throughout this crisis, Rhode Island's businesses have found creative ways to keep their doors open while keeping customers safe. I want to thank you for your continued partnership and innovation. That said, one area where we can all do better is in monitoring for symptoms. Individuals should be tracking symptoms daily, and businesses should be conducting health screenings at the front door. In that spirit, today I want to talk about a new tool to make it easier for businesses to screen for symptoms, and it's a tool that many of you already have on your phone. 82,000 Rhode Islanders have downloaded the Crush COVID app, and I'm excited to announce today that there's a new update available. It's currently available for download in the Apple App Store and Google Play. This update includes a couple new, useful features.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012UVe-Gb5uKeaPq7N0ly5vSJ4Ev_DHeciIBI2tw12uY7gsIzhdmc4CuTIK8-hekh5bYFXMSpL1goGPaJzu1cCatKIFBH6kGeq7Jg2drS8j8fPvykQO-JLj_F6WE1NgzsyKVPEgDaCumXI6u1X3SVNh5jh6mb5ZvAF-TnejyrM5te0FNrnnBoiFq9w2MMDF4PhFvJCICkLiDo=&c=Pg7jhlQ4nXtyf2mZn-UG4izNn2jRjuihFSqRgzASQVbRRLIoqlJEuA==&ch=68FHwx9UMbdTLKWVjMXE7aw2v1zmcql4T72UnObma8BhymBgEClF1A==)
---
| First, as those of you who use the app know, every day you are prompted to enter your symptoms. It only takes 30 seconds and is so important. Starting today, after you complete your daily symptom tracker, you'll get a screening page with either a green smiley face - meaning you don't have symptoms - or a red frown face - indicating you should stay home. This tool can make it much easier for businesses and schools to do their health screenings, and will make it quicker for you to enter. Rather than answering the same set of questions everywhere you go in the course of a day, you'll be able to simply hold up your phone with the green smiley face. We'll be working with businesses over the coming weeks to get them on board with this new system. We've also added a second new feature that's particularly useful as our kids get back to school. Starting today, you can track and log symptoms not just for yourself, but for up to 10 people in your household.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012UVe-Gb5uKeaPq7N0ly5vSJ4Ev_DHeciIBI2tw12uY7gsIzhdmc4CruHSie1WE9q-wQSL2rUBn_Sbcm3WhkXLhm0SG8COq86u3kphVTRSaZN7uGSSiGLBblSLOj3nltrpNFdl7ywlOGyU2sOBEj7Z2f87H2rZXMkc-Z2WjK-qm6HuLtYtCzQyMztlBAKXXV-6VMaEwoISPc=&c=Pg7jhlQ4nXtyf2mZn-UG4izNn2jRjuihFSqRgzASQVbRRLIoqlJEuA==&ch=68FHwx9UMbdTLKWVjMXE7aw2v1zmcql4T72UnObma8BhymBgEClF1A==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012UVe-Gb5uKeaPq7N0ly5vSJ4Ev_DHeciIBI2tw12uY7gsIzhdmc4CruHSie1WE9q-wQSL2rUBn_Sbcm3WhkXLhm0SG8COq86u3kphVTRSaZN7uGSSiGLBblSLOj3nltrpNFdl7ywlOGyU2sOBEj7Z2f87H2rZXMkc-Z2WjK-qm6HuLtYtCzQyMztlBAKXXV-6VMaEwoISPc=&c=Pg7jhlQ4nXtyf2mZn-UG4izNn2jRjuihFSqRgzASQVbRRLIoqlJEuA==&ch=68FHwx9UMbdTLKWVjMXE7aw2v1zmcql4T72UnObma8BhymBgEClF1A==).
---
| Finally, I am very excited to announce that we're launching a new contest this Friday. We're asking Rhode Islanders to download Crush COVID, complete your Symptom Diary for at least seven consecutive days, and submit a screenshot to enter for a chance to win a night's stay at the Renaissance, the Dean, or Hotel Providence. I'll share more contest details on my social media pages on Friday.
We're all in this together,
-Gina Raimondo Governor
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=186e1358-6256-49a8-922c-c6e39f306a1a)
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Future=20Generations?=
subject: I need your support
body:
I am feeling excited about the opportunity ahead, but so much is at stake it can be overwhelming. | | | | [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=3bf215b182&e=66979298f9)
---
| | | **Good evening! **

Chiara, co-founder of Future Generations, here.

There is a lot happening right now, so I am going to keep it simple.

Our race in Alaska is tied.

Now, we have just 54 days until the election and every vote counts.

I am writing to ask you to join me this evening in talking to voters about Al Gross' race for U.S. Senate.

Sign up here: [https://www.mobilize.us/futuregenerationspac/event/318982](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=7e079efa51&e=66979298f9)

We have a very user friendly step by step guide to voter contact. The calls are going really well so far, with most people responding positively.

I hope you join us! Our volunteers are stretched thin and we need all hands on deck until election day.

### A NOTE FROM CHIARA D'ANGELO
---
| |
---
We've come a long way! When we founded Future Generations we knew it would be difficult to get going in a sea of organizations. But we set out to be different. We set out to support candidates and incumbents who think not just of making a name for themselves with today's hot topics, but those who truly care about the world we are building for Future Generations to come. While you scroll through this email, I'd like you to ask yourself, "What is the legacy we'll leave behind?"

Chiara D'Angelo
National Campaigns Director
